place: Gardens of Eden, Cherngtalay, Choeng Thale, Thalang District, Phuket 83110, Thailand
title: ETRO Residences Phuket — Branded Residences in Gardens of Eden, Bang Tao
blurb: The debut of ETRO Residences Phuket — the Milanese fashion house's textile-rich soul re-threaded into the coastal fabric of Bang Tao. Just eight exclusive residences, three-bedroom apartments and sprawling penthouses, set at the heart of the 33-acre Gardens of Eden, where over 70% of the land is preserved nature. Freehold, from $6,000,000.
detail:
ETRO Residences Phuket is a rare expression of branded living — not a building stamped with a logo, but an entire creative ethos translated into a living environment. Developed by Amal Development within the prestigious, nature-first Gardens of Eden enclave and crafted with branded-real-estate specialists The One Atelier, the project re-threads ETRO's vibrant, textile-rich soul into the serene coastal fabric of Phuket's west coast.

The interiors — a collaboration between The One Atelier and ETRO Home Interiors realized with the ONIRO Group — are an atmospheric translation rather than a literal one. Expressive wall finishes and custom millwork draw on ETRO's textile archives, while a palette of oceanic blues, forest greens and sun-bleached neutrals echoes the surrounding jungle, sand and sea. Italian artistry is felt in velvet upholstery, artisanal wood and select marble; bespoke furnishings sit as integrated elements in a layered composition of light and proportion — expressive, tactile and deeply crafted, yet profoundly peaceful.

The residence is only one layer. Set within the 33-acre Gardens of Eden, where more than 70% of the land is dedicated to preserved nature, just eight residences — three-bedroom apartments and sprawling penthouses — are wrapped in lakes, shaded meditation trails and tropical gardens. Amenities unfold as a sequence of sensory experiences: yoga lawns at dawn, rainforest-edged and long lap pools, a dedicated concierge and personalized wellness programs, and eventual access to the pristine sands of Bang Tao Beach — with curated ETRO 'brand moments' connecting residents to the house's wider universe of fashion and culture. Freehold.

features.l: Interiors by The One Atelier & ETRO Home

place: Bang Kao, Maret, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: One-Rai Beachfront Land with Sea Wall, Bang Kao
blurb: A flat one-rai (1,600 m²) beachfront plot on Koh Samui's quiet southern coast, fronting a gently curving sand beach with calm, shallow water and island views across the bay. An existing concrete sea wall already protects the frontage, and the land is held under Chanote freehold title — a ready canvas for a private beach villa.
detail:
Set on the tranquil south coast of Koh Samui near Bang Kao, this one-rai (1,600 m²) parcel sits directly on the beach, with a gentle arc of soft sand, calm shallow water and open views across the bay to the islands of the Mu Ko Thale Tai national park beyond. Mature coconut palms line the shore, and the setting is peaceful and residential — yet close to the markets of Hua Thanon, the restaurants of Bang Kao and Lamai, and the island ring road.

Unusually, the beachfront is already protected by an existing concrete sea wall, removing one of the larger costs and approvals involved in building directly on the shore. The land is flat, cleared and ready to develop, with road access along the rear boundary and power at the street.

Held under Chanote title — the strongest form of freehold ownership in Thailand — the plot is well suited to a private beach villa or a small boutique residence. Genuine titled beachfront of this size is increasingly rare on Koh Samui, making this an attractive holding for an owner-occupier or investor. Freehold · Chanote.

place: Bang Kao Beach, Maret, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Beachfront & Sea-View Building Plots on Bang Kao Beach
blurb: A boutique subdivision of building plots on tranquil Bang Kao Beach on Koh Samui's quiet south coast — a soft, shaded shoreline of casuarina and coconut palms over calm, shallow turquoise water. Beachfront and second-row plots from 800 to 1,830 m² with 15–20.86 m of frontage, each on its own Chanote freehold title. From ฿17,000,000.
detail:
Set on the peaceful south coast of Koh Samui, this is a small, well-planned land subdivision fronting Bang Kao Beach — a calm, swimmable stretch of soft sand framed by mature casuarina and leaning coconut palms, looking out over shallow turquoise water to the islands beyond. It is one of the island's most natural and unspoiled beaches, yet within easy reach of Lamai, Hua Thanon's markets and the ring road.

The development is laid out as front-row beachfront plots and second-row sea-view plots, separated by an internal access road and a dedicated beach path, with sizes from around 800 m² to 1,830 m². Beachfront plots offer between roughly 15 and 20.86 metres of direct sea frontage; pricing starts from ฿17,000,000 for an 800 m² beachfront plot, with larger beachfront parcels and more affordable second-row plots also available — each held under its own Chanote title, the strongest form of freehold ownership in Thailand.

Flat, ready to build and individually titled, the plots suit a private beach villa, a small cluster of rental villas or a boutique development. With a survey plan and clear plot pricing in place, it is a rare chance to secure freehold beachfront on Koh Samui at an accessible entry point. Freehold · Chanote.

place: Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: 9-Rai Dual-Aspect Sea-View Land near InterContinental, Taling Ngam
blurb: An elevated 9-rai parcel (14,400 m²) on Koh Samui's prized Taling Ngam coast, moments from the InterContinental, with two distinct outlooks: north toward Khanom and the Mu Ko Thale Tai national park, and west to the sunset over Koh Phaluai (Virgin Island). At about 57 m elevation and 700 m from the beach.
detail:
Set on the tranquil south-west coast of Koh Samui near the InterContinental, this 9-rai (14,400 m²) parcel enjoys a rare dual aspect from a single elevated holding. To one side, the land frames a sweeping view across the channel toward Khanom and the scattered islands of the Mu Ko Thale Tai national park; to the other, it opens west to the sunset over Koh Phaluai — the so-called Virgin Island — and the calm waters of the gulf.

At roughly 57 metres elevation, the site catches cooling breezes and commands clean sightlines above the treeline, ideal for a private villa, a multi-villa estate or a boutique development designed around the two contrasting panoramas. The beach lies about 700 metres away, with the amenities, dining and marina life of the Taling Ngam coast close at hand.

Freehold and generous in scale, the land offers a strong canvas in one of the island's most established luxury enclaves, where sunset views and national-park scenery rarely come together on the same plot.

features.l: Khanom & Mu Ko Thale Tai outlook

place: Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Five-Islands Sea-View Hillside Land with 4-Villa Estate Plan, Taling Ngam
blurb: A 4.5-rai elevated parcel on Koh Samui's tranquil west coast, framing the celebrated panorama of the Five Sisters Islands (Koh Si Koh Ha) and the sunset waters beyond. Roads, underground power and a full service corridor are already in — and a designed masterplan for a four-villa estate is in place. Freehold, ready to build.
detail:
Set on the quiet, sunset-facing western side of Koh Samui, this 4.5-rai (≈7,200 m²) hillside parcel looks out over one of the island's most iconic views — the Five Sisters Islands (Koh Si Koh Ha) scattered across the calm channel, with open sea and dramatic sunsets beyond. The elevation gives clean, uninterrupted sightlines above the treeline, the kind of horizon that anchors a signature residence or boutique estate.

Unusually for raw island land, the groundwork is already done. The site is serviced by a concrete access road with a full service corridor and underground electricity — discreet, future-proofed infrastructure that preserves the natural setting while removing the slowest and most costly part of any development. A professionally designed masterplan for a four-villa estate, organised in two phases around an existing road and main gate, is in place and ready to take forward.

Whether built out as a four-villa rental or resale estate, a private family compound or a single grand residence with room to breathe, the land offers a rare combination of view, orientation, ready infrastructure and an approved design vision. Freehold, on the prestigious Taling Ngam coast minutes from beaches, marinas and the island's south-west lifestyle.

place: Koh Taen, Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: 30-Rai West-Facing Seafront Land on Koh Taen with 200m Frontage & Full Sunset Views
blurb: A 30-rai west-facing seafront holding on Koh Taen with around 200 metres of coral-fringed coastline and uninterrupted, full sunset views back across the channel to Koh Samui — the same outlook enjoyed from Conrad Koh Samui, a 7-minute boat ride away. Roughly 15 km off the mainland, jungle-clad and dramatic, it is a singular canvas for a boutique resort or private estate.
detail:
Draped across a jungle headland on the west side of Koh Taen, this 30-rai seafront parcel commands roughly 200 metres of coastline above coral reef and clear, shallow water. The land faces due west — so the entire arc of the sunset falls across the channel and the silhouette of Koh Samui beyond, the same celebrated outlook framed from Conrad Koh Samui directly across the water, just a 7-minute boat ride away.

Koh Taen sits about 15 km off the mainland, a quiet, largely untouched island off Samui's south coast. A concrete access road already threads along the slope through the property, and the topography rises from the shoreline into forested hillside — giving natural elevation for tiered villas, a clifftop restaurant or a layered resort that steps down to the sea. Mature jungle and rock give the site a wild, cinematic character rarely available at this scale.

With approximately 48,000 m² (30 rai), a generous sunset frontage and genuine seclusion within reach of Samui's lifestyle and airport, the property suits a boutique resort, a beach club or a private estate of real ambition — a blank canvas of rare scale, orientation and beauty. Freehold.

features.l: Same outlook as Conrad Koh Samui
Suits a beach club or estate

place: Koh Taen, Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: 15-Rai Beachfront Land on Koh Taen with White-Sand Frontage
blurb: A rare 15-rai beachfront parcel on Koh Taen — a quiet island roughly a 7-minute boat ride from southern Koh Samui — fronting white sand, coral-fringed shallows and uninterrupted views back across the bay to Samui's green hills. With its scale, privacy and natural setting, the land is ideally suited to a boutique resort, a villa project or a beach club.
detail:
Set on Koh Taen, a tranquil, largely untouched island off the south coast of Koh Samui, this 15-rai parcel runs directly to the beach — soft white sand, smooth rocks and clear, coral-fringed shallows, backed by mature coconut palms and tropical jungle climbing the hillside behind. The outlook is open and serene, sweeping across the bay to the silhouettes of Samui and the smaller islands scattered along the horizon.

The island sits just a 7-minute boat ride from southern Koh Samui, close enough for easy access yet far enough to feel genuinely elsewhere — no crowds, no noise, only water, sand and forest. That balance of seclusion and proximity is exactly what makes the site so compelling for a considered development.

With approximately 24,000 m² (15 rai) of beachfront land and a generous stretch of natural shoreline, the property lends itself to a boutique resort, a private villa estate or a beach club — a destination built around the rhythm of the tides and the quiet of the island. A blank canvas of rare scale and beauty in one of the Gulf's most unspoiled settings. Price on request.

features.l: Suits a villa or beach-club project

place: Chaweng hillside, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: 3,020 m² Hillside Sea-View Land with 5-Villa Development Plan, Chaweng
blurb: An elevated 3,020 m² (1 rai 3 ngan 55 sq wah) freehold hillside parcel in the desirable Chaweng area, surrounded by established luxury villa developments and framing sweeping sea views. A plan was drawn to develop five sea-view villas on the site. Chanote title, concrete road access — ready for a private villa or boutique development.
detail:
Positioned in the desirable Chaweng hillside area of Koh Samui, this elevated land parcel enjoys a peaceful setting surrounded by established luxury villa developments, with sweeping views over the town and the sea beyond. It offers convenient access to Chaweng Beach, shopping centres, international schools, restaurants, hospitals and Samui International Airport while keeping a tranquil residential atmosphere.

The plot measures 1 rai 3 ngan 55 sq wah — approximately 3,020 m² — held under Chanote title and offered freehold, with concrete road frontage and easy access on a gentle hillside topography. A development plan was previously drawn for five sea-view villas on the land, giving buyers a ready concept to build from. Note that a 6-metre building-height restriction applies to the site.

Naturally framed by mountain and tropical surroundings yet within an established villa neighbourhood, the parcel suits a private villa, a small boutique development or a long-term land investment. With strong appreciation potential in one of the island's most sought-after areas, it is ready for future construction.

place: Chaweng, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: 443 m² Flat Rectangular Sea-View Plot with Road Access, Chaweng
blurb: A flat, regularly shaped 442.8 m² plot (1 ngan 10.7 wah) in the Chaweng area, with direct road frontage, a Chanote title and elevated views toward the coastline and sea. Its practical rectangular dimensions make it well suited to a private pool villa, a small development or a residential investment. Freehold.
detail:
Situated in the Chaweng area, this rectangular land parcel offers convenient road frontage and easy access, making it suitable for a private residence, a villa development or an investment project. The plot benefits from a practical shape and dimensions that allow for efficient design and construction, and its elevated position opens to views over the surrounding town and the sea beyond.

The land measures approximately 442.8 m² (1 ngan 10.7 wah) under Chanote title, with a front width of about 20.23 m, a rear width of about 16.11 m, and side boundaries of roughly 22.03 m and 21.86 m. Flat and regularly shaped, it maximises usable space and allows for efficient planning while maintaining generous outdoor living areas, with established neighbouring properties and direct access for construction.

The dimensions are ideal for constructing a private pool villa, a holiday residence or a boutique investment property. Whether intended as a future home, a vacation retreat or a long-term investment, this freehold plot offers strong potential in one of Thailand's most desirable island destinations.

place: Layan, Choeng Thale, Thalang District, Phuket 83110, Thailand
title: Layan Verde — 4-Bedroom Sea-View Penthouse with Private Pool
blurb: A 519.6 m² four-bedroom penthouse at Layan Verde, the eco-inspired forest resort in Phuket's Layan–Bang Tao hills. Four en-suite bedrooms open to two terraces totalling around 90 m², a 35.5 m² private pool, a garden and a sauna, framing sea and private-pool views. Fully furnished package available; off-plan, completing Q4 2028.
detail:
A signature top-level residence within Layan Verde — the eco-inspired, self-sufficient forest resort set into the lush Layan–Bang Tao hills, roughly 1.1 km from Layan Beach. Spanning 519.6 m², this four-bedroom penthouse (Building A4) is laid out around a generous open-plan living room and kitchen that flow onto two terraces of about 26.6 m² and 63.3 m² — close to 90 m² of outdoor living — with a 35.5 m² private pool, a landscaped garden and a private sauna oriented to capture sea and pool views.

All four bedrooms are en-suite, ranging from roughly 16 to 27 m², with a powder room, walk-in wardrobe, a dedicated maid's room with its own bathroom, and a storage/laundry room completing a layout built for family living or premium rental. Interiors pair warm timber, travertine and soft sage tones with floor-to-ceiling glazing, delivered to a high standard with an optional fully furnished package.

Ownership extends the full Layan Verde resort lifestyle — signature restaurants and an ocean club, spa, onsen and sauna, fitness centres, rooftop and lap pools, kids' clubs, coworking spaces, padel and squash courts and more — with a loyalty programme of dining, spa and activity privileges across the complex. Off-plan, with completion scheduled for Q4 2028.

place: AYANA Heights, Cherngtalay, Choeng Thale, Thalang District, Phuket 83110, Thailand
title: AYANA Heights Seaview Residence — Hillside Sea-View Condos near Layan Beach
blurb: A new hillside sea-view condominium above Layan Beach at the northern end of Bang Tao, with eight low-rise buildings of four to six storeys set among lush landscapes and panoramic Andaman Sea views. Studio to four-bedroom residences from 37 m², wrapped in a full resort amenity set. Off-plan, completing 2026.
detail:
AYANA Heights Seaview Residence is a new luxury condominium perched on a hillside in the Layan Beach area, at the northern end of Bang Tao on Phuket's unspoiled west coast. Across eight low-rise buildings of four to six storeys, the project gathers 549 residences amid lush tropical landscapes, with upper floors opening to distant views of the sparkling Andaman Sea.

Layouts run from studios to one-, two-, three- and four-bedroom apartments, from around 37 to 117 m², giving buyers flexibility for a lock-up-and-leave bolthole, a family home or a rental investment. Interiors pair clean modern design with the natural beauty of the surroundings, finished to a high standard throughout.

Residents enjoy a complete resort amenity set — general and private pools, a gym, sauna and yoga zone, coworking and library spaces, a children's room and playground, a conference room, parking, 24-hour security with video surveillance and professional property management. Moments from Layan's beaches and the Laguna lifestyle hub, it offers a balance of luxury, comfort and proximity to nature. Off-plan, with completion scheduled for 2026.

place: Noble Form Thonglor, Sukhumvit 55, Khlong Tan Nuea, Vadhana, Bangkok 10110, Thailand
title: Noble Form Thonglor — Mid-Thonglor Skyline Tower with Panoramic City Views
blurb: One FORM to rule Thonglor's skyline — a 46-storey tower on Mid-Thonglor (Sukhumvit 55), among the tallest on the street, with panoramic city views and four storeys of skyline facilities. Steps from The Commons and Market Place and minutes to BTS Thong Lo, Ekkamai and Phrom Phong. Studio to three-bedroom residences, completed 2025.
detail:
Rising 46 storeys over Mid-Thonglor, this single-tower landmark stands among the tallest buildings on Sukhumvit 55, capturing panoramic views across the Bangkok skyline from its upper floors. Insightfully designed private and common spaces wrap around an urban oasis of roughly 1,500 m² of green space, bringing calm to one of the city's most sought-after lifestyle addresses.

Four storeys of skyline facilities crown and thread through the building — a swimming pool, a fully equipped gym, a jacuzzi and sauna, a library, concierge, landscaped gardens and a grill terrace — crafted for an upscale, amenity-rich lifestyle. Three passenger lifts and a service lift per core, auto-parking with EV charging and 24-hour security complete the offer.

Residences range from studios to three-bedroom layouts, from around 32 to 161 m², many delivered fully furnished. The location is the real luxury: steps from The Commons and Market Place community malls and a wealth of Thonglor's trendiest bars, cafés and restaurants, and minutes from BTS Thong Lo, Ekkamai and Phrom Phong. Completed in 2025.

features.l: Steps to The Commons & Market Place
Minutes to BTS Thong Lo & Ekkamai

place: Layan, Choeng Thale, Thalang District, Phuket 83110, Thailand
title: Layan Verde — Forest-Set Eco Residences with Resort Amenities, Layan
blurb: An eco-inspired, self-sufficient residential resort set into lush tropical forest in Phuket's prestigious Layan–Bang Tao hills, about 1.1 km from Layan Beach. Bionic terraced architecture draped in greenery wraps sky pools, gardens and a vast amenity programme, with studio to five-bedroom residences delivered fully furnished. Off-plan, completing Q4 2028.
detail:
Designed as a standalone resort environment — a verdant mini-city in the heart of Phuket's beauty — this eco-inspired development sets cascading, plant-draped terraces into the tropical forest of the Layan–Bang Tao hills, roughly 1.1 km from Layan Beach on the island's coveted west coast. The bionic architecture blends modern living with nature: green façades, winding garden boardwalks over water, and resort pools woven between the buildings.

Residences range from studios to expansive five-bedroom duplexes, with built areas from around 38 m² to 584 m², all designed by leading studios and delivered fully furnished with premium finishes and appliances. Interiors pair warm timber, travertine and soft sage tones with floor-to-ceiling glazing, open-plan living and private terraces — many with plunge pools and sea or forest views.

The amenity programme is exceptional: signature and all-day-dining restaurants, an ocean club, banquet hall and chef's table, spa, onsen and sauna, fitness centres and group-training studios, rooftop and lap pools, lounge cafés and rooftop bars, kids' clubs and playgrounds, coworking spaces and meeting rooms, a golf simulator, padel and squash courts, a climbing wall, BBQ zones and a dog park — alongside a shopping centre, supermarket and conference facilities.

Foreign buyers can own under the condominium freehold quota, with leasehold also available. With 24-hour security, generous parking and a wellness-driven, walkable masterplan, it suits families, lifestyle buyers, remote professionals and long-term investors seeking capital growth in one of Phuket's most sought-after areas. Off-plan, with completion scheduled for Q4 2028.

place: Choeng Mon headland estate, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84240, Thailand
title: Grand Eight-Bedroom Ocean-View Estate with Infinity Pool & Twin Kitchens
blurb: One of the island's largest private estates — eight oversized en-suite bedrooms across 1,808 m² of build on a 2,164 m² freehold headland plot above Choeng Mon, with panoramic ocean views, an infinity pool, twin kitchens and resort-scale entertaining space. Fully furnished and move-in ready.
detail:
Set on an elevated headland in the prestigious Choeng Mon area, this is a rare mega-estate built for grand-scale living. Across 1,808 m² of built area on a 2,164 m² freehold Chanote plot, the home pairs unmatched scale with premium craftsmanship — high ceilings, expansive open-plan rooms and floor-to-ceiling glass framing sweeping views over the Gulf of Thailand.

Eight oversized bedrooms each have private en-suite bathrooms and in-room comforts, with ten bathrooms in total giving flexibility for large families, multi-generational stays or a high-yield luxury rental operation. Two fully equipped kitchens serve both everyday life and professional catering, while a grand lounge anchors the home alongside multiple TV and relaxation rooms for privacy and entertaining.

Outdoor living centres on a large infinity pool and generous terraces, all oriented to capture the panoramic Choeng Mon seascape. Turnkey furnishings, government power and water, a private transformer, smart-home systems and a gated, secured setting complete a move-in-ready estate — minutes from Choeng Mon Beach, Chaweng, Fisherman's Village and Samui International Airport.

place: Choeng Mon headland estate, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Five-Bedroom Headland Villa with Infinity Pool, Private Gym & Spa
blurb: A five-bedroom villa stepping down a headland above Koh Samui's northeast coast, where all five en-suite bedrooms open to outdoor terraces, daybeds and uninterrupted sea views. A 14-metre infinity pool, a large sunset entertainment deck, a private gym and a dedicated spa room make it a complete retreat — 1,172 m² of build on a 1,919 m² plot.
detail:
Set into a dramatic headland on one of the estate's elevated positions, this five-bedroom villa is composed across several levels that follow the fall of the land — public rooms and pool gathered around the view, bedrooms and wellness spaces tucked into quieter levels below. All five en-suite bedrooms feature their own outdoor terraces, daybeds and incredible sea views; a bonus children's room with bunk beds adjoins one bedroom to form a family suite, and bathrooms are finished with large bathtubs and, in places, outdoor showers.

The open-plan kitchen and living areas flow out to a 14.2 × 6.2 m infinity-edge pool and a large sunset deck that transforms into a full entertainment venue for dinners and gatherings above the sea. A television lounge with surround sound extends to the living area, while the home's sound system runs throughout.

Wellness and leisure are built in: a fully equipped gym for working out in style, and a dedicated spa room for traditional Thai massage, yoga or a couple's treatment. Landscaped gardens, a maid's room and private parking complete a turnkey home on the headland — minutes from the island's beaches, restaurants and the airport, yet entirely private.

place: Choeng Mon headland estate, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Rock-Set Four-Bedroom Villa with 17-Metre Infinity Pool & Sea Views
blurb: Nestled amongst dramatic granite outcrops on a headland above the Gulf of Thailand, a four-bedroom villa with four large en-suite double bedrooms, private terraces and a 17-metre infinity pool with an exceptional view. An open-air dining and lounge area, an AV room and an expansive sun deck complete the home — 806 m² of build on a 1,636 m² plot.
detail:
Nestled amongst dramatic rock outcrops on one of the estate's elevated headland plots, this four-bedroom villa makes a virtue of its natural setting — granite boulders, stone walls and glass framing the open-air living spaces against the sea. Four large double bedrooms each have en-suite bathrooms and private terraces; the master adds an adjoining study and powder room that can be converted into an additional children's bedroom, with five bathrooms and rain showers throughout.

At the heart of the home, a large 8.8 × 17.2 m infinity pool with an exceptional view and an expansive sun deck frame the open-air dining area and relaxation lounge, all flowing together for effortless indoor-outdoor living. The AV room sits adjacent to the living area with a TV projector and large screen for cinema nights, and the villa's sound system runs throughout.

A fully equipped kitchen, a lounge/study room, landscaped gardens, a maid's room and private parking round out a turnkey home — secluded amongst the rocks yet minutes from the island's beaches, dining and the airport.

place: Taling Ngam North Beach, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84140, Thailand
title: Resort-Scale Seven-Bedroom Sunset Estate with Tennis Court, Gym & Spa, Taling Ngam
blurb: One of Koh Samui's most prestigious private residences — a seven-bedroom, resort-scale estate set on 9,600 m² of freehold Chanote land high on the tranquil southwest coast at Taling Ngam, famed for its sunsets. Sweeping panoramic sea views, landscaped grounds and a full suite of resort amenities — a fully equipped gym, private spa, full-size tennis court and Thai-style salas — make this a rare trophy property. Seven en-suite bedrooms, eight bathrooms, fully furnished and move-in ready.
detail:
This extraordinary seven-bedroom estate is one of the island's most prestigious private residences, offering an unrivalled combination of privacy, expansive land and world-class amenities in one of Koh Samui's most exclusive coastal areas. Set on an impressive 9,600 m² of freehold Chanote land, it delivers a level of space rarely found on the island, with sweeping panoramic sea views, beautifully landscaped grounds and luxury facilities throughout — a home designed for buyers seeking the very highest level of tropical living.

Taling Ngam is widely regarded as one of Koh Samui's most exclusive and tranquil areas, known for its breathtaking sunset views, natural landscapes and luxury private estates; properties of this scale and quality are extremely rare. The residence pairs seven spacious bedrooms with eight bathrooms, offering exceptional capacity for family and guests while the expansive layout keeps privacy intact across elegant living and entertainment spaces. Ownership is freehold under Chanote title — the highest level of land ownership in Thailand — providing maximum long-term security.

Designed as a true luxury retreat, the estate includes an impressive range of resort-style facilities: a fully equipped gym, a private spa area and a full-size tennis court create a complete wellness and recreation environment within the privacy of the grounds. Outdoor areas include beautifully maintained tropical gardens, large lawns and traditional Thai-style salas, perfect for relaxation, outdoor dining and entertaining, while the interiors support both elegant hosting and comfortable everyday living with spacious lounges, dining spaces and private bedroom suites. Generous parking, laundry areas and well-planned infrastructure support the scale of the home, with reliable government electricity and water.

Located on the peaceful southwest coast, the estate enjoys a quieter, more exclusive atmosphere than the island's busier zones, yet remains within comfortable driving distance of Lipa Noi Beach, five-star resorts, fine dining and Samui International Airport. With its massive land size, panoramic sea views, luxury amenities and resort-style design, it stands among the most unique properties currently available on Koh Samui. Offered freehold under Chanote title, fully furnished and move-in ready — priced at ฿400,000,000.

place: Thong Krut, Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84010, Thailand
title: Villa Beryl — Three-Level Sea-View Pool Villa with Overlapping Canopies, Thong Krut
blurb: Villa Beryl is a contemporary three-level sea-view residence built into a sloping hillside above Koh Samui's tranquil south coast at Thong Krut. Three en-suite bedrooms and a fully self-contained studio frame an open-plan white living space that opens to a 90 m² infinity pool, an outdoor bar and dining terrace, and uninterrupted views of the surrounding islands. 1,220 m² of build on a 1,800 m² plot — freehold, Chanote, move-in ready.
detail:
Villas built along a slope, such as this one, can yield something quite unique. Where a typical home places its public spaces on the ground floor with private rooms above, a home built into a hillside can invert that logic — putting the living areas at the top, where the entry is, and letting the bedrooms step down with the land. Villa Beryl sits on a sloping 1,800 m² plot above Thong Krut on Koh Samui's south coast, with three bedrooms — each with its own closets, bathroom and terrace — plus a fully contained studio with its own kitchen and living room, a main kitchen and living room, a pool, an outdoor bar and dining area, and parking for two cars. In total the structure delivers 1,220 m² across three levels, each adjusting to the topography.

The architecture is defined by a play of horizontal lines, formed by various overlapping canopies. Skylights draw natural light deep into the plan and open the lower level's interior to the sky. There is a sense of luxury, ease and warmth suited to the Koh Samui lifestyle and climate. The kitchen and living room are open and spacious, finished in a stark white that amplifies the sense of space, with accents in neutral tones that play with contrast. These rooms open out to a terrace with the pool, and beyond, the view of the surrounding islands — creating an exquisite continuity and dialogue between interior and exterior.

The aesthetic combines the clean lines and muted palette of contemporary design with exotic accents of natural elements and local stones unearthed during excavation. With its distinct long overhangs and roof planes, the style balances glamour with a cosy feeling of home, while borrowing from local traditions with sensitivity to history, location and context. The 90 m² infinity pool appears to merge with the horizon, wrapped by sun terraces, an alfresco dining area and an outdoor bar made for tropical entertaining; a self-contained studio, dedicated maid's quarters and covered parking for two cars add everyday practicality, all within a secure gated estate.

Thong Krut is renowned for its tranquility, natural beauty and authentic island charm, offering a slower pace of life with easy access to quiet beaches, fine dining and island-hopping excursions, and a comfortable drive to Lamai, Nathon and Samui International Airport. Offered freehold under Chanote title, fully furnished and move-in ready.

features.l: 90 m² infinity pool over the sea

place: Chaweng Noi Hills, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Chaweng Noi Hilltop Villa with Infinity Pool, Cinema & Games Room
blurb: A modern multi-level villa perched in the Chaweng Noi hills with a wraparound terrace and an infinity pool framing Chaweng Beach and Koh Phangan beyond — four en-suite king bedrooms, a private cinema and a games room with full bar. 520 m² of build on a 708 m² plot — freehold, move-in ready.
detail:
Perched majestically in the prestigious Chaweng Noi hills, this contemporary four-bedroom villa is a study in indoor-outdoor island living, opening to panoramic views that sweep from the vibrant curve of Chaweng Beach to the serene silhouette of Koh Phangan. A wide cantilevered terrace and an infinity-edge pool anchor the home, with a vast sun deck, daybeds and a covered sanctuary for shaded afternoons above the sea.

Inside, a large air-conditioned living space is layered with plush seating and wall-mounted screens, flowing to a fully equipped Western show kitchen. Entertainment runs deep: a private cinema, a games room with pool, ping-pong and foosball tables, a full-size arcade and an in-house bar, plus Sonos throughout, a stocked wine fridge and a garden with a tranquil waterfall.

Four en-suite double bedrooms each have king beds, and the master enjoys spectacular sea views from one of the largest bathrooms on the island. The home delivers 520 m² of build on a 708 m² plot with covered parking, sold freehold and move-in ready. Chaweng Noi beach is a five-minute walk, with restaurants, bakeries and shops moments away — and the position makes the villa equally suited to private ownership or a premium rental program.

place: Chaweng Hills, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Seven-Bedroom Hillside Estate on 7 Rai with Infinity Pool & Gulf Views, Chaweng
blurb: A private estate set across seven rai of elevated hillside above Chaweng, where seven en-suite bedrooms, generous open living spaces and an infinity pool look out over the Gulf of Thailand. Fully furnished and turnkey, on a scale of land rarely found this close to the island's lifestyle hubs — freehold, Chanote, move-in ready.
detail:
It is unusual to find this much land — seven rai — held in one piece so close to Chaweng. That space is the estate's first luxury: a sense of privacy and quiet that comes from being set back and lifted above the coast, with landscaped gardens and open ground on every side. The elevated position does the rest, drawing refreshing breezes across the house and opening sweeping views over the Gulf of Thailand from the living areas, the bedrooms and the pool terrace alike.

Seven en-suite bedrooms make room for large families, gathered friends or a premium rental program, with two additional children's rooms suited to multi-generational stays. The plan is built around open living spaces that connect directly to the outdoors, embracing the indoor-outdoor rhythm of island life. At its heart sits an infinity pool set along the edge of the terrace, positioned to hold the horizon and the coastline below, with generous deck space for shade, sun and long evenings as the light goes down.

Delivered fully furnished, the residence is ready to enjoy or to place into rental from day one. Government electricity and water supply the home, parking is generous, and the freehold Chanote title offers the strongest form of ownership available — a rare combination of scale, position and security in one of Koh Samui's most sought-after hillside settings, minutes from Chaweng Beach, Fisherman's Village and the airport.

place: Thong Krut hillside estate, Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84140, Thailand
title: Cantilevered Hilltop Villa with Floating Marble Infinity Pool, Cinema & 270° Sea Views
blurb: An extraordinary five-bedroom residence perched atop a steep hill within a private gated estate of around fifty lots above Koh Samui's south coast. Steel, glass and stone wrap a hilltop lookout where a white-marble infinity pool floats out over the jungle, framing uninterrupted 270° views across the southern coastline, the islands of Koh Taen and Koh Madsum, and the mainland beyond. A 250 m² King Suite wing, a 200 m² private cinema and games room, a sea-view gym and 4.5 rai of landscaped gardens complete a true trophy home. Freehold, Chanote title.
detail:
Perched high atop a steep hill within a private gated community of about fifty estate-sized lots above Koh Samui's southern coast, this is one of the island's genuine architectural statements. Sweeping mountain and ocean views pour in through floor-to-ceiling glazing throughout a house that wraps around its hilltop lookout, balancing steel, glass and stone with warm curves and sumptuous furnishing. An expansive promenade deck and a white-marble infinity pool reach out over the gardens, delivering uninterrupted 270° views across the southern coast, the neighbouring islands of Koh Taen and Koh Madsum, and the mainland. Surfaced in cool Balinese White stone, the deck holds carefully placed shaded seating, a fully tiled poolside bathroom and a well-equipped bar — the perfect stage for entertaining above the sea. All through the home, open spaces frame the surrounding 4.5 rai of landscaped gardens, where indigenous palms, lilies and bougainvillea nestle amongst large rocks hewn from the hillside.

Secured in its own wing, the 250 m² King Suite floats above the hillside and backs onto a secluded walled garden. Italian white-marble flooring flows through four large rooms; the main bedroom rises to 4-metre coffered ceilings with a sunken bed area set behind 8 metres of glazing that bathes in natural light and sea views. A sunken lounge opens onto natural rock steps leading down to the walled lawn and its bougainvillea beds, while a designer bathroom with German fixtures and a walk-in dressing room in smoked-glass Italian furniture flank the central space. The wing also holds a fully equipped sea-view gym and direct access to the private 200 m² cinema and games room — 5-metre ceilings, acoustic insulation and antique teak floors, with a sunken lower level for table tennis and snooker, three reclining leather sofas facing a big screen, a bar and a connection to the courtyard garden.

The main house is entered through a serene courtyard from the double garage, opening to a double-height foyer where dramatic front glazing reveals the infinity pool and the sea and mountains beyond. A spiral glass stairway descends to three further guest bedrooms, each with stunning views and a covered balcony. Adjacent to the foyer, the Queen Suite carries coffered ceilings and a terrazzo-and-rosewood floor, leading to a remarkable glass-and-steel bathroom cube glazed on three sides and cantilevered six metres above the ground — an unforgettable spot to watch the sunset from the freestanding bath. The central lounge opens completely through bi-folding doors onto the promenade deck and pool, with deep coffered ceilings, terrazzo floors and a marble back wall backing onto a fully equipped teak-furnished kitchen. The whole house is fitted with bespoke LED lighting, silent air-conditioning and an exacting attention to detail in Italian marble, teak and terrazzo throughout.

Offered freehold under Chanote title — 2,000 m² of build on an 8,000 m² plot, five bedrooms and five bathrooms. Priced at ฿120,000,000.

features.l: 250 m² King Suite in private wing

place: Thong Krut, Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84140, Thailand
title: Elevated Six-Bedroom Sea-View Villa with Cinema & Yoga Sala, Thong Krut
blurb: A spacious, fully furnished six-bedroom villa elevated above Koh Samui's tranquil south coast at Thong Krut, capturing sweeping sea views across the southern shoreline. A large swimming pool, a cinema room and a private yoga sala anchor 594 m² of resort-style living on a generous 1,600 m² plot. Freehold, move-in ready.
detail:
A luxury six-bedroom sea-view villa at Thong Krut — a rare chance to own a spacious, fully furnished residence in one of Koh Samui's most serene and unspoiled coastal areas. Set on a generous 1,600 m² plot and delivering around 594 m² of built-up area, the home is elevated to capture sweeping sea views, designed for buyers seeking privacy, scale and a refined tropical lifestyle away from the island's busier hubs. Thong Krut, on the south coast, is renowned for its tranquil atmosphere, natural beauty and authentic island charm — appealing strongly to lifestyle buyers and investors after exclusivity and long-term value in a low-density setting.

The villa pairs six bedrooms with seven bathrooms in a well-planned, multi-level layout that offers exceptional comfort and flexibility for families, guests or luxury rental use. Open-plan living areas maximise natural light and airflow while staying seamlessly connected to the outdoors, and high ceilings and generous proportions create an elegant yet relaxed environment. At the heart of the outdoor area is a striking 88 m² swimming pool with ample room for leisure and entertaining, wrapped by terraces and social areas that embrace indoor-outdoor living against uninterrupted sea views.

Lifestyle facilities go beyond the standard: a private yoga sala for wellness, meditation or fitness; a cinema room for indoor entertainment; and dedicated storage and BBQ zones that enhance everyday practicality and hosting. Sold fully furnished as a turnkey property, the villa is ready for immediate move-in or rental operation, with reliable government electricity and water supply.

Thong Krut is increasingly sought after by buyers who value privacy, nature and a slower pace of island life, with stunning sunsets, nearby islands, local seafood restaurants and quiet beaches — all within driving distance of Lamai. With its large plot, panoramic sea views, extensive amenities and furnished condition, the villa is a compelling lifestyle purchase and a strong long-term hold in one of Koh Samui's most peaceful coastal locations. Offered freehold and move-in ready — priced at ฿89,000,000.

place: Laem Sor, Na Muang, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84140, Thailand
title: Four-Bedroom Beachfront Pool Villa on Laem Sor's Southern Coast
blurb: A four-bedroom beachfront pool villa on Koh Samui's tranquil southern coast at Laem Sor, with direct access to soft white sand and the turquoise Gulf of Thailand. Four en-suite bedrooms, a horizon-edge infinity pool and floor-to-ceiling sea views, set in a landscaped tropical garden. Freehold, move-in ready.
detail:
Island elegance on Koh Samui's serene southern coast — an exceptional four-bedroom beachfront pool villa at Laem Sor that pairs architectural sophistication with the calm of a tropical seaside retreat. Set on a private parcel with direct beachfront access, it lets residents step from the home onto soft white sand and into the turquoise water of the Gulf of Thailand — an exclusive residence or a high-value investment in one of Samui's most peaceful and scenic regions.

Four spacious bedrooms each have an elegant en-suite bathroom, ensuring comfort and privacy for family and guests, while the interior is designed to embrace natural light, with floor-to-ceiling windows framing the sea and a seamless flow between indoor and outdoor living. At its heart is a striking infinity pool that appears to merge with the horizon, wrapped by a beautifully landscaped tropical garden and curated outdoor spaces for relaxation and gatherings under the open sky. Private parking and full turnkey furnishing complete the offering.

Laem Sor is celebrated for unspoiled beauty, a tranquil atmosphere and secluded stretches of beach. Unlike the busier tourist hubs, it offers unmatched privacy while remaining accessible to the island's amenities — leisurely walks along quiet shores, cultural sites such as the Laem Sor Pagoda, and fresh seafood at nearby beachfront restaurants. Shopping and dining in Lamai and Thong Krut are a short drive away, and Samui International Airport is reachable in under forty minutes.

Beachfront homes with freehold ownership in prime Samui locations remain limited, and as the island continues to attract international buyers and luxury tourism, the villa offers both an exquisite private residence and strong long-term investment and rental appeal. Offered freehold under Chanote title, brand-new, fully furnished and move-in ready — priced at ฿94,000,000.

features.l: Near Laem Sor Pagoda & Thong Krut

place: Tong Krut Beach, Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84010, Thailand
title: Five-Bedroom Beachfront Pool Villa on Tong Krut Beach, Taling Ngam
blurb: A contemporary five-bedroom beachfront villa on Koh Samui's serene southern coast, set directly on the pristine sand of Tong Krut Beach in the unspoiled enclave of Taling Ngam. Two beachfront pavilions, five en-suite bedrooms, a sun-soaked infinity pool and a grand cascading-waterfall entrance — a private sanctuary with concierge and private-chef service.
detail:
A remarkable five-bedroom beachfront villa on Koh Samui's serene southern coastline, in the highly desirable enclave of Taling Ngam — a private retreat that blends contemporary sophistication with the natural beauty of the island. Positioned directly along the pristine shores of Tong Krut Beach, with sweeping sea views, a private infinity pool and lush landscaped gardens, it appeals equally to families, investors and those seeking a quiet sanctuary by the sea.

From the grand entrance framed by cascading waterfalls, the home reveals its commitment to architectural elegance. Five expansive en-suite bedrooms form its heart, with two beachfront pavilions giving residents the privilege of waking to the sound of waves and uninterrupted ocean vistas. Each bedroom is meticulously designed for privacy and comfort, with marble-adorned bathrooms and luxury fittings throughout. The main pavilion opens onto expansive terraces and a sun terrace wrapping the infinity pool, while floor-to-ceiling windows frame the turquoise water beyond.

Designed as both a home and a lifestyle destination, the villa is ideal for entertaining, family gatherings or quiet evenings by the sea, elevated by personalised services including concierge and private-chef experiences — a balance of seclusion and tailored service that suits private living or a high-performing luxury rental.

Taling Ngam is among Koh Samui's most unspoiled regions, celebrated for natural beauty, quiet beaches and an authentic island atmosphere, yet within reach of restaurants, beach clubs and wellness retreats. Tong Krut Beach offers calm waters for swimming and paddleboarding, the Angthong Marine Park and fishing villages are close by, and Samui International Airport is within a 45-minute drive. Offered freehold under Chanote title, fully furnished and move-in ready — priced at ฿78,000,000.

place: Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: 2-Rai Beachfront Land on the Taling Ngam Coast
blurb: A rare 2-rai (3,200 m²) freehold beachfront plot on one of Koh Samui's most serene coastlines, with direct beach frontage and turquoise Gulf-of-Thailand views. A gentle natural slope and easy build potential make it ideal for a private villa estate or boutique resort. Chanote title.
detail:
An exceptional 2-rai beachfront plot in Taling Ngam — a rare chance to acquire freehold property on one of Koh Samui's most serene and picturesque coastlines. With a direct beachfront position and breathtaking views of the turquoise Gulf of Thailand, the land suits a luxury private villa, a small collection of high-end villas, or a boutique resort, in an exclusive and tranquil part of the island.

The parcel measures 2 rai (3,200 m²), offering ample space for a large private estate with infinity pools, outdoor living areas and landscaped tropical gardens. Its gentle slope and natural elevation enhance the sea views while keeping construction straightforward, and direct beach frontage makes it one of the most versatile coastal offerings currently available on the island.

Taling Ngam is renowned for its pristine coastline, dramatic sunsets and authentic island charm. Unlike the busier resort areas, the region remains unspoiled, protecting the privacy and exclusivity of properties here. Within a short drive are the famous Five Islands viewpoint, the InterContinental resort and beachside seafood restaurants, while Samui International Airport and the busier areas of Lamai and Chaweng are about thirty minutes away. Offered freehold under Chanote title, with private transformer and deep-well water in place.

features.l: Suits a villa estate or boutique resort

place: Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: 10-Rai Beachfront Development Land, Taling Ngam
blurb: A rare 10-rai (16,000 m²) freehold beachfront landholding on Taling Ngam's pristine southwest coast, with wide direct beach frontage and unmatched ocean and sunset views. A vast canvas for a luxury resort, boutique retreat or exclusive villa enclave. Chanote title.
detail:
An exceptional 10-rai beachfront landholding in Taling Ngam, offering unmatched ocean views and direct access to a pristine sandy beach — a rare opportunity for investors and developers to establish a luxury resort, boutique retreat or exclusive residential enclave in one of Samui's most sought-after coastal locations. The expansive parcel ensures privacy and exclusivity, wrapped in lush tropical greenery with the sound of waves at its edge.

The 10 rai (16,000 m²) provides a vast canvas for imaginative development — luxury villas, a boutique resort or an upscale residential community that blends modern architecture with the island's natural beauty. Its wide beachfront frontage allows multiple configurations that maximise sea views and private beach access, and freehold ownership adds long-term security and flexibility rarely found at this scale.

Situated in the southwest of Koh Samui, Taling Ngam balances seclusion with accessibility — home to some of the island's most luxurious five-star resorts and upscale dining, yet peaceful and low-density. Lipa Noi Beach and Thong Krut Village, both known for authentic Thai charm and seafood, are close by, with the airport, malls and healthcare conveniently connected. Sunsets, calm waters and views toward the Ang Thong Marine Park complete the setting. Offered freehold under Chanote title, with private transformer, underground cables and government utilities in place.

features.l: Suits a resort or villa enclave
Near Lipa Noi & Thong Krut Village
Views to Ang Thong Marine Park

place: Maenam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84330, Thailand
title: Dual Beachfront Villa Estate with 42m Frontage, Maenam
blurb: Two independent luxury beachfront villas sold together as one estate, on a 3,200 m² plot with roughly 42 metres of absolute Maenam beach frontage. Fourteen bedrooms across the two homes, each with its own 15-metre pool and direct sand access, plus a gym, sauna and conference room — a rare trophy compound for a family, retreat or boutique-hospitality buyer. Freehold.
detail:
One of the most exclusive opportunities currently available on the island — a dual beachfront villa estate in Maenam, comprising two separate luxury villas sold together on a substantial 3,200 m² plot with direct beach access and a combined ~42 metres of prime beach frontage. The scale, privacy and irreplaceable beachfront positioning suit ultra-high-net-worth buyers, family compounds, boutique wellness retreats or luxury hospitality concepts.

Villa One holds seven bedrooms and nine bathrooms, a private gym, a sauna, a conference/meeting room, timber ceilings throughout, large BBQ and entertainment areas, a 15 × 5-metre swimming pool and approximately 23 metres of direct beach frontage. Villa Two holds seven bedrooms and seven bathrooms, its own 15 × 5-metre pool and roughly 19 metres of frontage. Both are designed to operate independently or as a single private estate — flexible for personal use, staff accommodation or high-end rental.

The estate delivers a full resort-style living experience, with wellness and lifestyle facilities including the gym and sauna and generous outdoor entertainment spaces ideal for events, retreats or extended family stays. The dedicated conference room further enhances its versatility for executive retreats, wellness programmes and luxury corporate rentals — an increasingly in-demand segment of the Samui market.

Maenam is widely regarded as one of Koh Samui's most desirable beachfront locations, with long stretches of natural sand, calm swimming and a relaxed yet upscale atmosphere, within easy reach of Fisherman's Village, international schools, golf and Samui International Airport. Absolute beachfront plots of this size and frontage are extremely limited, making this estate a true legacy asset. Offered freehold, fully furnished and move-in ready — priced at $13,000,000.

place: Bang Rak, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Modern Four-Bedroom Beachfront Villa, Bang Rak
blurb: An absolute-beachfront four-bedroom villa on a 800 m² plot in prestigious Bang Rak, with 461 m² of refined modern architecture, panoramic Gulf views and turquoise water steps from the garden. Four en-suite bedrooms, a private pool, expansive terraces and direct beach access. Off-plan, freehold.
detail:
One of Koh Samui's most exclusive coastal offerings — a luxury four-bedroom villa positioned directly on the shoreline in prestigious Bang Rak, combining absolute beachfront positioning, panoramic ocean views and refined modern architecture. Set on a generous 800 m² plot with a built-up area of 461 m², it delivers privacy, elegance and direct access to the sea, a rare combination in today's market.

The villa enjoys uninterrupted sea views and oceanfront frontage, with panoramic vistas across the Gulf of Thailand and tranquil turquoise water just steps from the garden. Four spacious bedrooms each have an en-suite bathroom, and the layout blends open-plan living with clearly defined entertainment and relaxation zones. High ceilings, modern architectural lines and expansive glass openings flood the interior with light and frame the ocean backdrop, while premium materials and refined finishes elevate the ambiance.

Outdoor living is central to the design: a private swimming pool, expansive terrace and balcony areas, a landscaped garden and direct beach access create a seamless indoor–outdoor flow for entertaining, sunset dining or relaxing in complete privacy by the sea. Premium features include a jacuzzi, a bar area, a kitchen island, a laundry room with washer/dryer, air conditioning throughout, a private gated entrance and covered parking.

Bang Rak remains one of Koh Samui's most desirable coastal neighbourhoods, with strong rental demand and convenient access to Fisherman's Village, international schools, restaurants and Samui International Airport. Absolute beachfront properties here are extremely limited, making this a rare acquisition — ideal as a private residence, executive holiday home or high-end rental investment. Off-plan and offered freehold — priced at ฿80,000,000.

place: Chaweng Hills, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Elevated Chaweng Hillside Plot with 115m Sea-View Frontage
blurb: An elevated 2-1-21.9 rai (3,687.6 m²) hillside plot above Chaweng with a wide 115-metre sea-view frontage, framing a sweeping panorama over Chaweng Lake, the bay and the Gulf of Thailand. Set among established contemporary pool villas with road access in place — a ready canvas for a sea-view villa or a small boutique development.
detail:
An elevated hillside plot in the Chaweng hills, measuring 2-1-21.9 rai (3,687.6 m²), with an unusually generous 115-metre-wide frontage oriented to the view. From this vantage the land opens to a sweeping panorama over Chaweng Lake, the long curve of Chaweng Bay and the Gulf of Thailand beyond — a north-east aspect that captures both the water and the island's green interior.

The plot sits within an established pocket of contemporary sea-view pool villas, with a sealed road reaching the boundary and utilities running to the neighbouring homes, reducing the cost and complexity of development. The gentle hillside gradient lends itself to a layered, stepped design — ideal for a single signature sea-view residence, or a small cluster of villas that each frame the bay.

The position keeps the land private and elevated yet close to everything Chaweng offers: a short drive down to Chaweng Beach and its restaurants, beach clubs and nightlife, with Central Festival mall nearby and Samui International Airport roughly fifteen minutes away. Offered freehold.

features.l: Suits a villa or boutique development

place: Anantara Layan, Layan, Choeng Thale, Thalang District, Phuket 83110, Thailand
title: Kiara Reserve Residences by Anantara — Pool Villas & Condominiums in Layan Bay
blurb: Branded pool villas and condominiums set on a lush, ocean-facing hillside within a celebrated five-star resort in Layan Bay — just 42 residences across 100 rai, steps from Layan Beach. Three- and four-bedroom homes from 251 to 829 m², each with a private pool, plus access to the resort's spa, restaurants, beach club, helipad and yacht jetty. Freehold, off-plan.
detail:
A luxury branded residential development of just 42 private pool villas and condominiums in Layan Bay, on the north-west coast of Phuket — spaciously allotted over 100 rai (40 acres) of lush, ocean-facing hillside, steps from Layan Beach and adjacent to two existing ultra-luxury residences and a celebrated five-star resort. Set within the resort itself, the homes share its grounds, services and hotel-standard maintenance, with planned future expansion expected to lift both lifestyle and value over time.

The collection is composed of 17 three- and four-bedroom villas of 501 to 655 m², and 25 three- and four-bedroom condominiums — single-storey, duplex and penthouse layouts ranging from 251 to 829 m². Every villa and condominium has its own private pool. Interiors are generous and resort-grade, conceived for indoor-outdoor living against the hillside and ocean backdrop.

On-site facilities include a residents-only swimming pool, fitness centre, club house and parking, while the wider resort opens up Thai and international restaurants, a renowned spa, beachside dining and a rooftop bar at the beach club, an active sport-and-leisure zone, and an on-site helipad and yacht tender jetty. Ownership comes with a rental programme operated by the hotel group's real-estate team and exclusive privileges across its global hotel and loyalty networks.

The setting is the rare draw: serene, green Layan, with the resort's beach frontage and beach club at your doorstep, Layan Beach just 600 metres away, the Laguna resort district a couple of kilometres on, and Boat Avenue and Porto de Phuket around fifteen minutes' drive — Phuket International Airport is roughly twenty-five minutes. Offered freehold within a hotel development, with attractive terms of just 10% down and 70% payable on handover. Priced from ฿44,500,000.

place: Pru Jampa, Thep Krasattri, Thalang District, Phuket 83110, Thailand
title: Lakeside Pool Villa in an Ultra-Low-Density Wellness Community, Layan
blurb: A pool villa within one of Asia's most ambitious wellness communities — an ultra-low-density estate of just 70 homes across 237 acres of forest, lakes and parkland, where only 15% of the land is built. Two- to four-bedroom villas in two architectural languages, set along natural lakes, with a managed wellness resort, clubhouse, Olympic pools and an 11 km jogging trail. Fully furnished.
detail:
A one-of-a-kind landmark that integrates a multigenerational living community with a world-class wellness destination in Layan, northern Phuket — built by the owners of one of the island's most exclusive pool-villa resorts on 600 rai (237 acres) of pristine green land. It is ultra-low-density by design: only 15% of the territory will ever be developed, the rest left to greenery, lakes and park zones, much of it endemic planting grown over decades. Just 70 villas exist in the entire community, and the estate minimises car traffic — guests park centrally and travel by electric shuttle — while avoiding harmful chemicals in favour of organic alternatives.

The villas are designed to blend into the landscape, most built along one of the natural lakes or ponds, and come in two architectural languages: one rich in timber and natural materials with contemporary Japanese, Chinese and Thai influences, the other a modernist composition of concrete and curved glass. Both offer two-, three- and four-bedroom layouts, with built-up areas ranging from 333 to 853 m². All are delivered with a full furniture package, with optional upgrades including a circadian lighting system.

Life centres on wellbeing. An on-site resort and clinic — operated by one of the world's leading authorities in preventative and regenerative medicine — anchors a roster of facilities: a clubhouse with a Michelin Green Star zero-waste restaurant, an Active Movement Center with Olympic-sized pools and certified instructors, a mindfulness centre and grand hall, a wellness restaurant set on a lake, a wetland nature reserve for natural water filtration, a community garden, and a network of jogging tracks (11 km within the residential area alone). Concierge, housekeeping and an in-house rental programme are complemented by shuttle access to the founders' beach resort.

The setting in Pru Jampa keeps the estate gated, tranquil and green, yet within ten minutes of Boat Avenue, Porto de Phuket and the Laguna resort district. Layan Beach and the airport are around fifteen to seventeen minutes away. As a transformative multi-billion-baht development occupying a significant share of the area, the project is itself the kind of large-scale anchor that lifts surrounding land values as it matures. Offered freehold and fully furnished — priced from ฿61,000,000.

place: Laguna Phuket, Bang Tao, Choeng Thale, Thalang District, Phuket 83110, Thailand
title: Garrya Residences Phuket — Beachfront Hotel-Managed Residences on Bangtao Beach
blurb: A beachfront, hotel-managed investment residence by a world-famous hospitality group, set directly on Bangtao Beach at the seaside edge of Laguna Phuket. A low-rise boutique resort of just 38 apartments across four buildings, with a beach club, wellness centre and signature pools — top-floor homes have private rooftop pools. Owners earn a share of resort income plus complimentary annual stays. Off-plan, leasehold.
detail:
A new beachfront luxury resort by a world-famous hospitality group, set directly on Bangtao Beach in the southernmost part of Laguna Phuket — beside the developer's own Laguna Seaside and just 500 metres from the famous Catch Beach Club. It is a low-rise boutique resort comprising four residential buildings of four storeys each, with a total of only 38 exclusive apartments between them, alongside the resort's own hotel and beach club.

The homes are designed for privacy and the view: spacious living rooms open through panoramic balconies to sweeping vistas over Bangtao Beach, with only two to three units per floor. Top-floor apartments enjoy private rooftops with their own swimming pools. Layouts run from efficient one-bedrooms of 57 m² to expansive two-bedroom penthouses of up to 220 m².

Importantly, this is purely an investment property rather than a conventional residence: buyers acquire a hotel unit in a professionally managed resort under a respected wellbeing-resort brand, receiving a share of the hotel's income plus complimentary stays of 30–90 days per year depending on the chosen programme — with an exchange option to use part of that allocation at the group's hotels in other countries. Resort amenities include a beach club and bar, a wellness centre, an all-day dining restaurant, a lap pool, a party pool, a jungle pool and a reflection pond, with Bangtao's own beach clubs and restaurants at your feet.

The address sits within Laguna Phuket — a 1,000-acre integrated resort in the centre of Bangtao beach, maintained to hotel standards, with seven hotels, residences, a golf course, restaurants, spas and retail galleries, plus year-round sporting and cultural events and intra-resort shuttles. Ownership carries the group's signature privileges — Sanctuary Club membership, Laguna Golf membership, and the rare offer of developer financing. Completion expected 2027, offered leasehold — priced from ฿16,670,000.

place: Bang Tao, Choeng Thale, Thalang District, Phuket 83110, Thailand
title: The Standard Residences Phuket Bang Tao — Low-Rise Branded Residences at Laguna's Gateway
blurb: Branded lifestyle residences at the gateway to Laguna and Boat Avenue — a low-density, low-rise enclave of just 188 homes across six buildings, set within a 17-rai lifestyle compound with hotel F&B, a spa and a 25-metre pool. Spacious one-bedrooms through 313 m² duplexes, fully furnished and hotel-serviced. Off-plan.
detail:
Branded lifestyle residences in one of the prime spots of Bang Tao, bringing the style and service of a globally celebrated boutique hotel collection to everyday life — answering the question everyone faces when checking out of a great hotel: what if you didn't have to? Aesthetic swagger, boundary-breaking design, hotel-style amenities and a vibrant calendar of food, art, music and cultural programming, all at home. Developed by the residential and resort arm of one of Thailand's largest conglomerates — the group behind Porto de Phuket and Central Floresta.

The project is a luxury low-rise boutique residence with one of the best locations in recent years, right beside Laguna and Boat Avenue. It is deliberately low-density: just 188 spacious units across six buildings of seven floors each, ranging from solid 75 m² one-bedrooms to gorgeous 313 m² duplexes, all delivered ready to move in with bespoke furniture and finishes. The homes sit within a larger 17-rai (27,200 m²) lifestyle compound that also houses a lifestyle hotel and its own food-and-beverage offerings.

Facilities carry the hotel ethos through to residents: a lobby with a game area, theater room and a multipurpose space for meetings, screenings and private events; a fitness suite and private studio; a 25-metre swimming pool and a separate leisure pool; a spa with sauna and bath experience; and a pet-friendly area. A 24-hour concierge and security, plus buggy and shuttle service, are complemented by on-demand housekeeping, laundry, in-room dining, personal trainer, therapist, babysitting and curated workshops.

The address is the rare advantage. Boat Avenue — northern Phuket's most popular shopping and dining district — is 100 metres away, the entrance to Laguna Phuket 200 metres, Porto de Phuket lifestyle mall 600 metres, and Bangtao Beach within walking distance at 1.5 km, with Phuket International Airport around 25 minutes by car. Offered foreign freehold with a buyer-friendly payment schedule (50% payable on completion) and the full custom furniture package included. Completion expected Q4 2026 — priced from ฿21,900,000.

features.l: 100 m to Boat Avenue · 200 m to Laguna

place: Bang Por, Maenam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: 8-Rai Sea-View Development Land, 80m from Bang Por Beach
blurb: A rare 8-rai (12,800 m²) sea-view development plot on Koh Samui's tranquil northwest coast, just 80 metres from Bang Por Beach with direct access to the public beach entrance. Positioned on the main coastal road in the coveted yellow zone — an ideal canvas for a villa estate, boutique condominium or resort-style project. Chanote freehold.
detail:
A rare opportunity to secure 8 rai (12,800 m²) of prime real estate on the sought-after northwest coast of Koh Samui. Positioned just 80 metres from Bang Por Beach with direct access to the public beach entrance, the site enjoys both convenience and exclusivity, with sweeping ocean views — an ideal canvas for luxury development in one of the island's most desirable and fast-growing areas.

Strategically located on the main coastal road, this freehold sea-view land benefits from superb visibility and accessibility. Zoned within the coveted yellow development zone, it opens up a variety of high-value projects, from boutique condominium complexes to exclusive villa estates. Priced competitively at ฿17,200,000 per rai for a total asking price of ฿150,000,000, it is one of the last remaining large sea-view sites within walking distance of the beach.

The configuration offers flexibility for a wide range of concepts — luxury pool villas, modern apartment buildings or a mixed-use resort-style project. Its proximity to the shore ensures uninterrupted ocean vistas, while the elevated position captures cooling breezes and breathtaking sunsets over the Gulf of Thailand, allowing generously proportioned units, landscaped gardens, communal facilities and infinity pools that fully leverage the panoramic setting.

Bang Por is renowned for its tranquil charm — a beach that stretches for several kilometres of soft white sand and calm, year-round swimming water, while remaining within easy reach of the island's amenities: Fisherman's Village in Bophut is fifteen minutes away, with Chaweng and Samui International Airport around twenty-five minutes. With limited availability of large sea-view plots near the beach, the holding is well positioned for significant long-term capital appreciation. Offered freehold under Chanote title.

features.l: Suits villas, condos or a resort

place: Chaweng Hills, Chaweng, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Hilltop Mansion with Twin Infinity Pools & Panoramic Sea Views, Chaweng
blurb: A rare trophy villa in the Chaweng hills, set on a 1,780 m² plot with roughly 1,000 m² of build and panoramic views over the Gulf of Thailand. Its signature is a double-level infinity pool — a 16-metre upper pool on the main terrace and a second oasis below — alongside six en-suite bedrooms, a private gym, sunken pool lounge and BBQ sala. Move-in ready, fully furnished, Chanote freehold.
detail:
A rare trophy villa in one of Koh Samui's most coveted hilltop locations, set on a generous 1,780 m² plot with roughly 1,000 m² of built-up area and designed for buyers seeking a statement home that blends dramatic architecture, panoramic ocean views and five-star resort-style amenities. From the moment you arrive, the scale of the residence, its grand proportions and the sweeping vistas over the Gulf of Thailand set it apart. Offered freehold under Chanote title — the highest level of land tenure in Thailand — and sold with a company for effortless, efficient transfer.

The defining feature is an iconic double-level infinity pool. The upper pool measures 16 × 6 metres, positioned to capture unobstructed ocean and coastline views from the elevated main terrace, with a generous deck for sunbathing and sunset cocktails. Below, a second infinity pool of 9 × 4.5 metres offers an additional oasis of privacy. A sunken pool lounge, an outdoor BBQ area and a covered sala create multiple social and dining spaces that connect indoor and outdoor living for intimate gatherings or large events.

Inside, expansive interiors carry high ceilings, generous proportions and a design that emphasises light, space and views. The open-plan living and dining areas flow onto the main terrace and upper pool, with large windows and sliding glass framing the sea from multiple angles. The home offers six spacious bedrooms and seven bathrooms — several with direct sea views and terrace access — plus separate helper/maid quarters and a private gym for wellness routines without leaving the estate.

The Chaweng-hills position keeps the home private yet superbly connected: roughly eight minutes to the white sand of Chaweng Beach, around ten minutes to Central Festival, twelve minutes to Fisherman's Village in Bophut, and fifteen minutes to Samui International Airport. Surrounded by fine dining, five-star resorts and upscale wellness, it is delivered fully furnished and turnkey — a standout for private living, exclusive holidays or premium luxury rental. Priced at ฿133,000,000.

features.l: 1,780 m² plot · ~1,000 m² build · Chanote freehold

place: Millionaire's Mile, Kamala Headland, Kamala, Kathu District, Phuket 83150, Thailand
title: Waterfall-Side Sunset Villa with Infinity Pool & Private Cove, Kamala Headland
blurb: An architectural marvel on Kamala's famed Millionaire's Mile, set on a 3,404 m² sea-view plot beside a year-round waterfall, with a private pathway down to an ocean cove. Five suites, a 25-metre infinity pool with swim-up bar, private spa, two fitness rooms and a cinema — sunset views over the Andaman from every level.
detail:
An architectural marvel set among the most beautiful scenery of the Kamala headland, on Phuket's renowned Millionaire's Mile — the scenic ridge between Kamala and Kalim beaches that has drawn a collection of private villas and five-star resorts for its Andaman views, tropical calm and exceptional privacy. The villa sits within an exclusive gated community with 24-hour security on a 3,404 m² sea-view plot, adjacent to a year-round waterfall from which it takes its character, with a private pathway leading down to an ocean cove for swimming, snorkelling and diving.

Spanning roughly 1,800 m² of covered space with a further 700 m² of terraces, the home is composed of five luxurious bedrooms — including a grand master suite with its own office. Floor-to-ceiling retractable glass doors on both sides of the main living volume dissolve the line between inside and out, while custom oversized bathtubs and high-end finishes define the ensuites. Craftsmanship runs through every detail: teak floors, ceilings and furniture, imported Brazilian and Italian stone, Spanish fabrics and Thai silk, and a Western show kitchen fitted with premium Italian appliances and bespoke teak joinery.

The resort-style amenities want for nothing — a 25-metre infinity pool with a swim-up bar and children's area, a terraced lawn set beside the cascading waterfall, two fully equipped fitness rooms (one for cardio and dance, one for strength training), a private spa, a cinema and media room, a separate studio and a secluded relaxation terrace. A covered poolside dining area opens to sweeping ocean views for al fresco meals.

Despite its secluded, natural setting, the villa is well connected: the calm family beach at Kamala is a short drive, the nightlife and shopping of Patong within easy reach, and Surin, Bang Tao, Kathu and Karon all 15–30 minutes away. Completed in 2023 and offered Thai Freehold under NS3K title, with a backup generator and a three-car garage. Priced at ฿490,000,000 — viewings by appointment only.

features.l: 25 m infinity pool with swim-up bar
Private path to an ocean cove
3,404 m² plot · ~2,500 m² build · Thai Freehold

place: Bang Tao, Choeng Thale, Thalang District, Phuket 83110, Thailand
title: PEYLAA Phuket — Low-Rise Garden-Courtyard Residences with Rooftop Tennis, Bang Tao
blurb: A low-density enclave of three low-rise buildings wrapped around a four-rai garden courtyard, moments from Boat Avenue and the greens of Laguna. Modern-tropical residences in earthy tones and natural textures — one- to three-bedroom homes, fully furnished, with three 25-metre pools, a rooftop tennis court and an extensive wellness club. Off-plan.
detail:
Set in the heart of Bang Tao on Phuket's fast-developing west-coast corridor, this is a low-density community of just three low-rise buildings arranged around an expansive garden courtyard of more than four rai — the majority of the ten-rai site given over to greenery and facilities rather than density. Conceived under a coastal-chic philosophy of earthy tones, natural textures and understated materials, the architecture feels calm and grounded, softening the line between the interiors and the tropical landscape.

The 408 residences are bright and generously proportioned, offered in one-, two- and three-bedroom layouts from roughly 45 to 129 square metres — including the option to combine a one- and two-bedroom into a 127 m² three-bedroom home. Each is delivered fully furnished, with floor-to-ceiling windows, balconies framing the gardens and pools, deep-soaking bathtubs and integrated smart-home technology, and is managed to international hotel standards with concierge services and a dedicated residential team.

Life here is built around wellness and sport. The facilities are unusually extensive: three 25-metre swimming pools — one for each building — alongside a kids' pool and a jacuzzi, a fully equipped gym with a dedicated boxing ring, pilates and yoga studios, ice baths and an outdoor fitness terrace, and a full-sized rooftop tennis court. A welcome lounge, a co-working space with meeting rooms and silent booths, a library, a multi-purpose pavilion and a children's playground complete the offering, with professional rental management and a shuttle service on hand.

The position is the quiet advantage. Boat Avenue — the dining and shopping hub of Bang Tao — sits roughly 600 metres away, with Porto de Phuket lifestyle mall, the greens of Laguna golf and Bang Tao Beach all within easy reach, and Phuket International Airport around 25 minutes by car. Offered freehold under foreign quota, with completion expected in Q4 2027 — priced from ฿7,626,000.

features.l: Gym with boxing ring & yoga studio

place: Samrong Bay, Plai Laem, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Beachfront Four-Bedroom Villa with Cinema Room & Swim-Up Bar, Samrong Bay
blurb: A one-of-a-kind waterfront residence on the northeastern tip of Samui, set directly on swimmable Samrong Beach in a gated beachfront community. Built into a sloped site so every room frames the bay, the Six Senses headland and Koh Phangan — four sea-view master suites, a 15-metre pool with a sunken swim-up bar, and a cinema room.
detail:
