Set on the prized northeastern tip of Koh Samui, directly on the year-round swimmable sand of Samrong Beach, this is a waterfront retreat within an exclusive gated beachfront community with 24-hour security and on-site management. Built on a unique sloped terrain, every room captures panoramic sea views over the secluded bay, the Six Senses headland and the iconic silhouette of Koh Phangan, with a 20-metre stretch of private beach frontage.

The villa is composed of four master bedrooms, each with its own sea-view balcony, ensuite bathroom and luxurious bathtub. The open-plan living, dining and state-of-the-art kitchen flow seamlessly onto an expansive pool terrace with a 15-metre swimming pool and an outdoor pavilion housing a sunken swim-up bar — a setting for alfresco dining, sunbathing in privacy or simply unwinding to the sound of the waves. A dedicated cinema room offers a cozy escape for movie nights.

Beyond the living spaces, a beautifully manicured garden stretches toward the ocean, and the home includes a staff living quarter, staff kitchen and a covered garage for two cars. Built in 2019 on a 921.6 m² plot with roughly 1,200 m² of build area, it is offered freehold under Chanote title — moments from The Bay Samui and Six Senses, and four-and-a-half kilometres from Samui International Airport.

features.l: 15 m pool with sunken swim-up bar

place: Chaweng Noi Hills, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Granite-Boulder Architectural Villa with Infinity Pool & Sea Views, Chaweng Noi
blurb: An award-winning architectural villa on the Chaweng Noi hillside, where the design is built around the site's giant granite boulders. Three en-suite bedrooms below, an open upper level opening to an 11.5-metre infinity pool and pool bar above, framed by floor-to-ceiling glass with unobstructed sea views — part of a boutique estate of just six homes.
detail:
Set on a coveted Chaweng Noi hillside between two of Samui's signature beaches, this is an exclusive residence within an award-winning boutique development of just six contemporary villas, a kilometre from the pristine sand of Coral Cove. The landmark architecture is defined by the giant granite boulders of the site, masterfully integrated into both the exterior and the interior so that nature and design become one.

The two-level home places three en-suite bedrooms on the lower floor, with a master suite beautifully built into the surrounding granite — the boulder forming a dramatic natural feature within the luxurious bathroom. The upper level opens to an airy living, kitchen and dining space that flows onto an expansive terrace with an 11.5-metre infinity-edge pool, lounge and pool bar, where floor-to-ceiling glass frames the granite-rock facade on one side and sweeping ocean vistas on the other.

Finished with a noble teak-and-stone staircase, a fully equipped kitchen, smart-TV solutions and modern climate control throughout, the villa is completed and ready for occupancy or rental, with an experienced on-site management team. Roughly 375 m² of total build area; the elevated position has a steep approach, so an SUV is recommended. Twenty minutes from the airport and seven from Bangkok Hospital Samui.

features.l: Boutique estate of just six villas

place: Choeng Mon, Plai Laem, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Brand-New Balinese Three-Pavilion Pool Villa, 400m to Choeng Mon Beach
blurb: A brand-new Balinese-style retreat a 400-metre stroll from Choeng Mon Beach — three individual pavilions arranged around a private 8-metre pool and a frangipani garden, with soaring timber ceilings, a European kitchen, and a fitness room and 24-hour security within the gated estate. Turnkey and ready to move in or rent.
detail:
Welcome to an elegantly designed, brand-new three-bedroom villa set within an exclusive gated estate just 400 metres from the idyllic sand of Choeng Mon Beach — with restaurants, bars, massage shops and convenience stores a short stroll away, making it ideal for relaxed island living or a hassle-free holiday rental. The home follows a Balinese-style layout, with three individual pavilions thoughtfully arranged around a private 8-metre swimming pool for true indoor-outdoor living.

The open-plan living pavilion is crowned by soaring timber ceilings and centred on a spacious lounge with a 55-inch smart TV, served by a fully equipped European-style kitchen with dishwasher, oven, four-ring stove, pantry and laundry. A guest pavilion holds two en-suite bedrooms with built-in wardrobes, while the master pavilion offers a spacious main bedroom and a luxurious en-suite with a bathtub.

Outside, a landscaped garden with a mature frangipani tree wraps the pool, and a covered carport with an automatic gate completes the home. Residents enjoy the estate's fitness room, on-site management, jogging track and 24-hour gated security. Brand-new and fully turnkey on a 600 m² plot with 290 m² of build area — two-and-a-half kilometres from the airport and close to Big Buddha and Fisherman's Village.

place: Chaweng Noi Hills, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Curved-Roof Hillside Villa with Infinity Pool & Sea Views, Chaweng Noi
blurb: A sculptural villa in an exclusive gated hillside community above Chaweng Noi — sweeping curved-cantilever roofs over walls of glass, a stone-clad infinity pool with a sunken sea-view lounge, and panoramic views across the bay to Koh Phangan. The show villa shown; three- and four-bedroom layouts available.
detail:
Set within an exclusive gated community on the Chaweng Noi hillside, this is contemporary tropical architecture at its most assured — a single villa from a small collection of sea-view homes, defined by sweeping curved-cantilever roofs, natural stone feature walls and full-height glass that dissolves the line between inside and out. From its elevated position the home commands panoramic views across the bay and out to Koh Phangan, with cooling breezes drawn across the terraces.

The show villa pictured spans roughly 430 m² of built area on a 670 m² plot, arranged for effortless indoor-outdoor living: an open-plan living, dining and island kitchen in marble and warm timber slides open to a wide deck and a stone-clad infinity pool that reads as a sheet of water against the horizon. A sunken poolside lounge, sun deck and shaded sala extend the entertaining space, while the primary suite opens to its own sea-view terrace, freestanding tub and twin stone vanities.

Finished to a high specification and delivered fully furnished, the residence includes covered parking for two cars and the security and landscaped grounds of a managed estate, five minutes from Chaweng Noi's beaches, restaurants and international schools. Offered freehold; the gated community also offers further three-bedroom and four-bedroom layouts to choose from.

features.l: Panoramic sea views to Koh Phangan
Primary suite with sea-view terrace & tub
Five minutes to Chaweng Noi beach

place: Santikhiri hilltop community, Koh Samui, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Near-Two-Rai Panoramic Sea-View Hilltop Land
blurb: A near-two-rai hilltop plot at the top of one of Koh Samui's most original hillside communities — almost 2,883 m² with Chanote title, road access and a stunning panorama over the coastline and islands. The land faces south and west for the sunset, with high privacy yet good neighbours and easy convenience.
detail:
This land sits at the very top of Santikhiri, one of Koh Samui's most original and spectacular residential communities — a magical retreat to escape the stress of modern life. It is a village surrounded by nature, offering a high degree of privacy while keeping convenience, good care and good neighbours close at hand.

The plot measures 1-3-20.8 rai — almost two rai, around 2,883 m² — and is held under Chanote title, the strongest form of land ownership in Thailand, available freehold or on a leasehold basis. It connects directly to the community road and sits close to the common area, with a gentle elevated position that opens to a stunning panorama across the sea, the long beach below and the scattered islands beyond.

The land faces south and west, framing the sunset and catching cooling afternoon light and breeze — an ideal orientation for a private villa designed around the view. Surrounded by jungle and rock outcrops, it offers the seclusion of a hilltop while remaining part of an established, well-cared-for community of architectural villas.

features.l: Ready to build a private villa

place: Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Ridge-and-Saddle Hillside Land with 270° Sea Views, Taling Ngam
blurb: A rare 20,572 m² (12-3-43 rai) hillside landholding in one of Koh Samui's most exclusive, untouched corners — Taling Ngam, on the quiet southwest coast. A dramatic ridge-and-saddle topography divides naturally into elevated plots with uninterrupted panoramic views across the Gulf of Thailand. Eleven Chanote freehold deeds, single ownership.
detail:
Set within one of Koh Samui's most exclusive and untouched hillside locations on the quiet southwest coast at Taling Ngam, this is a rare opportunity to develop a collection of private luxury villas with uninterrupted panoramic sea views. Spanning 20,572 m² (12-3-43 rai) across eleven Chanote freehold title deeds held in single ownership, the land divides naturally into multiple elevated plots — each benefiting from privacy, orientation and dramatic topography.

The site is defined by a distinctive ridge-and-saddle formation that lends itself to layered, stepped architecture capturing expansive vistas across the Gulf toward Laem Sor, Koh Tan, the mainland and the west coast — with potential for near-270-degree panoramas from the prime plots and close to 360-degree views from the summit. Mature tropical vegetation and natural segmentation between plots give the holding a sense of seclusion rare on the island, while direct road access reaches every plot and established water infrastructure on site reduces development complexity and cost.

The land suits a low-density luxury masterplan — up to nine private villas, or a preferred configuration of three ultra-premium private estates, each with its own identity, scale and view orientation. It sits among prestigious neighbours including the Conrad Koh Samui, InterContinental and the Kamalaya wellness sanctuary, within an established, secure enclave — a foundation for a genuinely landmark hillside residence or boutique villa development. (All figures indicative and subject to verification and design development.)

features.l: Direct road access to all plots
Views to Laem Sor & Koh Tan

place: Bang Por, Maenam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84330, Thailand
title: Single-Storey Beachfront Pool Villa with 14-Metre Pool & Koi Pond, Bang Por
blurb: A rare modern beachfront villa on Koh Samui's tranquil north coast at Bang Por — built in 2023, set directly on the sand with a 14-metre pool running parallel to the shore, a landscaped beachfront garden and koi pond. Three bedrooms plus a flex room, single-storey, freehold and turnkey.
detail:
This rare beachfront villa at Bang Por is a modern seaside residence on Koh Samui's tranquil, low-density north coast — positioned directly on the sand for uninterrupted ocean access and a front-row tropical lifestyle that is increasingly hard to secure. Built in 2023 on a generous 770 m² plot, it pairs contemporary design with privacy, space and immediate beach access for luxury living or premium investment.

The single-storey home offers roughly 209 m² of built area, thoughtfully designed to maximise beachfront views and indoor-outdoor flow: three bedrooms and three bathrooms plus a flexible multipurpose room that works as an office, guest room or storage. Open-plan living connects seamlessly to the patio and garden, with a striking 14-metre private pool running parallel to the shoreline as the centrepiece, and built-in furniture throughout for a clean, low-maintenance aesthetic.

Beyond the pool terrace, a landscaped beachfront garden preserves open sea views while adding privacy, and a decorative koi pond brings a calming natural note. Maid's quarters, private parking, government utilities and security round out a turnkey, fully furnished home — with Maenam, Nathon, international schools and the airport all within easy reach of one of Samui's most sought-after quiet beachfront enclaves.

place: Plai Laem, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Beachfront Villa with 15-Metre Infinity Pool, Plai Laem
blurb: A magnificent beachfront villa set directly on the sand at Plai Laem — six en-suite bedrooms across 750 m² on a 1,850 m² freehold plot, a 15.5-metre infinity-edge pool over the ocean, a children's pool and a rooftop terrace, minutes from Choeng Mon and under ten from the airport.
detail:
This magnificent six-bedroom beachfront villa is one of Koh Samui's most exclusive properties — set directly on the sand in the serene Plai Laem area for a rare combination of privacy, space and uninterrupted ocean views. Spanning 1,850 m² of freehold Chanote land with roughly 750 m² of built area, it suits both family life and entertaining, as a private residence or a prestige investment.

Six spacious en-suite bedrooms, a maid's room, a fully fitted modern kitchen and generous indoor-outdoor living open to an expansive beachfront terrace, where floor-to-ceiling windows frame panoramic sea views and ocean breezes flow through the home. A rooftop terrace and multiple lounge zones extend the entertaining space across the multi-level plan.

The centrepiece is a 4.6 × 15.5-metre infinity-edge pool overlooking the ocean, with a separate 3 × 7-metre children's pool for younger guests, backed by both private-well and government water for reliability. Plai Laem keeps Choeng Mon Beach, Fisherman's Village and the island's premier dining minutes away, with Samui International Airport under ten minutes — a turnkey, move-in-ready beachfront asset in one of Samui's strongest locations.

place: Lipa Noi, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84140, Thailand
title: Beachfront Villa with Sea-Merging Infinity Pool, Lipa Noi
blurb: A contemporary beachfront villa on the calm west-coast sands of Lipa Noi — 850 m² of refined living on 1.2 rai, five en-suite bedrooms, floor-to-ceiling glass, and a striking infinity pool that merges visually with the sea, framing Samui's famous sunsets. Move-in ready, freehold.
detail:
This exceptional beachfront villa sits on one of Koh Samui's most tranquil stretches of coastline in Lipa Noi — 1.2 rai of prime beachfront land with 850 m² of refined indoor living designed for both privacy and grand entertaining. Contemporary architecture, expansive ocean views and direct beach access make it a standout among the island's west-coast homes, offered move-in ready and fully furnished.

Five spacious en-suite bedrooms serve as private retreats, the master framing panoramic turquoise-sea views, while expansive living and dining areas flow outdoors through floor-to-ceiling windows so natural light and sea breezes define the interior. A fully equipped western kitchen with island counter complements the design for family living and high-end entertaining alike.

At its heart, a striking infinity pool merges visually with the sea beyond, with an outdoor terrace and jacuzzi for Samui's world-famous sunsets and direct access to Lipa Noi's soft sands. A dedicated laundry, separate staff quarters and generous storage round out the home, in a gated, managed, west-coast setting prized for calm, family-friendly beaches — with strong long-term value and rental appeal.

features.l: Infinity pool merging with the sea

place: Laem Sor Beach, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Beachfront Balinese Pavilion Villa with 21-Metre Pool & Koh Tan Sunsets, Laem Sor
blurb: A rare beachfront estate on the quiet south coast — contemporary Balinese pavilions on a wide 24-metre stretch of sand, a 21-metre pool running parallel to the shore, and daily golden sunsets over the islands of Koh Tan and Koh Madsum. Six suites, freehold, turnkey.
detail:
This beachfront Balinese luxury villa in Laem Sor is a rare opportunity to own a prime freehold, Chanote-title estate directly on the sand. Around 1,200 m² of built area is arranged across sea-facing pavilions to maximize privacy, comfort and panoramic ocean views, with a wide 24-metre beachfront that turns the daily golden sunset over Koh Tan and Koh Madsum into a defining feature of the home.

At its heart is a grand open-plan living pavilion embodying tropical resort-style living — expansive lounge and dining areas flowing through sliding walls to the pool terrace and the beach beyond. A 21-metre private saltwater pool runs parallel to the shoreline, drawing a striking line between the water, the white sand and the islands on the horizon, ideal for relaxed family living and large-scale entertaining.

Six beautifully appointed bedrooms each connect to gardens or sea, served by seven bathrooms and guest powder rooms, with natural stone, rich timber and contemporary Balinese detailing throughout, single-storey and fully furnished. Laem Sor is among Koh Samui's most unspoiled coastlines yet close to restaurants (five minutes), Thong Krut village and island-hopping to Koh Tan (ten minutes), with Lamai about twenty minutes and the airport around thirty-five — a private boutique-resort feel with strong rental-investment fundamentals.

features.l: 21 m saltwater pool along the sand
Sunsets over Koh Tan & Koh Madsum

place: Chaweng Noi, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84310, Thailand
title: Hillside Estate with 20-Metre Infinity Pool & Spa, Chaweng Noi
blurb: One of Chaweng Noi's most exclusive residences — a ~2,700 m² estate across multiple levels with a 20-metre infinity pool over the Gulf, a children's pool and a natural jacuzzi rock pool, plus a private spa and massage room. Five suites, eleven baths, panoramic sea-and-mountain views. Move-in ready, freehold.
detail:
This extraordinary five-bedroom estate is one of the most exclusive residential offerings in Chaweng Noi — set on a generous 1,600 m² plot with an impressive ~2,700 m² of built area, elevated above the coastline to capture sweeping sea views and a lush mountain backdrop. The scale, location and amenities place it firmly within the top tier of Koh Samui real estate, equally suited to a private family compound, a prestige holiday residence or a hospitality-style investment.

The architecture blends indoor luxury with expansive outdoor living: five bedrooms and eleven bathrooms give exceptional flexibility for family, guests and staff, while large open-plan living areas are positioned to capture both sea and mountain views in dramatic, light-filled volumes. Multiple leisure zones elevate it to a true resort — a spectacular 20-metre infinity-edge pool over the ocean, a separate children's pool, and a unique natural jacuzzi rock pool integrated into the landscape.

Wellness runs deep, with a dedicated spa area and massage room rarely found in private residences, alongside both Western and Thai kitchens for daily living and large-scale entertaining. Equipped with government electricity and deep-well water and held freehold under Chanote title, it sits minutes from Chaweng Noi's beaches, international schools, hospitals and the airport while remaining private on its hillside setting.

features.l: 20 m infinity pool over the Gulf

place: Plai Laem, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Three-Level Sea-View Villa with 16-Metre Pool & Jacuzzi, Plai Laem
blurb: A landmark three-level residence in the exclusive Plai Laem enclave — five en-suite bedrooms across roughly 1,300 m², a resort-style 16-metre pool with a hot-tub jacuzzi, and open living that flows to wide terraces and verandas. Move-in ready and fully furnished, freehold.
detail:
Set in one of Koh Samui's most exclusive residential enclaves on the Plai Laem peninsula, this ultra-luxury villa delivers an extraordinary 1,300 m² of built area across three levels on a 950 m² plot. Designed for high-end tropical living, it combines scale, privacy and premium finishes close to beaches and island amenities, and is offered freehold and fully furnished as a secure, move-in-ready home or blue-chip investment.

Arranged over three floors, the layout balances open social volumes with private retreats — five bedrooms and six bathrooms, high ceilings and large internal volumes, with open living and dining areas flowing seamlessly onto terraces and verandas for year-round indoor-outdoor living. The configuration suits families, guests and luxury rental use alike.

The outdoor centrepiece is a 16-metre swimming pool framed by a generous terrace for sun loungers and outdoor dining, complemented by a dedicated hot-tub jacuzzi for a private resort-style atmosphere. Plai Laem is prized for its upscale villas and easy access to Choeng Mon, Big Buddha and Samui International Airport — a refined yet relaxed setting with strong long-term value.

place: Plai Laem, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Hilltop Estate with Dual Sunrise & Sunset Infinity Pools, Plai Laem
blurb: A landmark three-level estate on the Plai Laem peninsula with 270-degree panoramic sea views — its signature a pair of infinity pools angled to catch both sunrise and sunset. Four sea-view en-suites, gym, sauna, games room and koi-pond gardens, on 1,800 m² in a gated enclave.
detail:
Set in a private, gated enclave on Koh Samui's northeastern peninsula, this is one of the island's most exceptional hilltop estates — roughly 1,200 m² of built area on an 1,800 m² plot, with a near-total seclusion and 270-degree panoramic sea views that capture both sunrise and sunset from an elevated position with ocean on three sides.

Arranged across three levels for indoor-outdoor flow, the home's defining feature is a pair of infinity-edge pools strategically oriented to the morning and evening light, set among landscaped gardens, koi ponds and cascading water features. The main level opens a grand living and dining volume to expansive terraces and open-air salas, served by a full western kitchen, with all four en-suite bedrooms enjoying sweeping sea views.

Wellness and entertainment run deep — a professionally equipped gym, a sauna and jacuzzi positioned for the view, a games room with pool table and a separate TV lounge — backed by serious infrastructure: solar power, a full-capacity generator, deep-well supply, staff quarters and gated parking for four. Offered fully furnished and freehold, it sits within walking distance of Tongson and Samrong bays and five minutes from Choeng Mon village.

place: Maenam Soi 1, Maenam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84330, Thailand
title: Contemporary Beachside Pool Villas, Five Minutes to Maenam Beach
blurb: A limited collection of contemporary tropical villas on Maenam Soi 1 — a five-minute stroll from the sand of Maenam Beach. Each home pairs open-plan living with a private pool and garden, available as five bedrooms or four-plus-office, delivered fully turnkey. Off-plan, from ฿20.4M.
detail:
An exclusive enclave of only a handful of contemporary villas on Maenam Soi 1, set along Koh Samui's quieter north coast just a five-minute walk from the pristine sand of Maenam Beach. The position balances privacy and convenience — close to shops, restaurants and international schools, and within easy reach of Fisherman's Village and Bophut — while staying wrapped in tropical calm.

Each villa is composed for effortless island living: open-plan living and dining that flow seamlessly indoors to out, a private swimming pool and garden, and high-quality finishes throughout in a clean, contemporary tropical architecture built for durability. Homes are configured as five bedrooms, or four bedrooms plus a dedicated office, across roughly 443 m² of built area on plots from 403 m².

Delivered fully turnkey — with curated interior design, premium materials and appliances included — the villas suit a holiday home, a full-time residence or a rental investment, with strong rental demand in Maenam and optional management for owners. Offered off-plan and freehold, from ฿20,400,000.

place: Chaweng, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Off-Plan Four-Bedroom Pool Villa with Panoramic Sea Views, Chaweng
blurb: A contemporary off-plan villa on an elevated Chaweng plot — four en-suite bedrooms across 1,200 m², floor-to-ceiling glass framing panoramic Gulf views, and a private pool on a generous sun terrace. Delivered fully furnished, freehold.
detail:
An off-plan opportunity in the heart of Chaweng, this contemporary villa spans an impressive 1,200 m² of built space on a 1,250 m² plot, composed for modern tropical living with privacy, style and comfort. Four spacious bedrooms each have a private en-suite, while floor-to-ceiling windows flood the open-plan living and dining areas with light and frame breathtaking sea views from an elevated position over the Gulf of Thailand.

The home centres on a private swimming pool ringed by a spacious sun terrace — a year-round setting for entertaining and relaxing — alongside a sleek Western-style kitchen, lush landscaping and private parking. It is delivered fully furnished with curated décor, secure Chanote title and freehold ownership.

Set in the heart of Chaweng, the villa balances tranquility with access to the island's most vibrant beaches, nightlife, dining and shopping, with Samui International Airport a short drive away. Its size, design and position make it equally compelling as a private residence or a high-yield rental investment.

place: Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Three-Level Hillside Estate with Ten Sea-View Suites, Bophut
blurb: A landmark three-storey estate rising over the Bophut hills — ten en-suite bedrooms, a 1,333 m² interior, and panoramic sea-and-mountain views from wide terraces, with a private gym, sauna and sala set across 1,840 m² of grounds. Offered freehold, off-plan.
detail:
Set on one of Bophut's most prestigious hillside positions, this ultra-luxury residence is a rare large-scale offering in the Koh Samui market — a three-storey estate of roughly 1,333 m² built area on a generous 1,840 m² plot, composed to capture panoramic sea views, mountain vistas and complete privacy from multiple vantage points.

The layout distributes ten en-suite bedrooms and 10.5 bathrooms across three levels, balancing private suites with large social volumes. High ceilings, wide terraces and carefully positioned openings draw in natural light and frame the surrounding coastline, making it equally suited to a flagship private residence, a multi-generational estate, a luxury rental operation or a boutique hospitality concept.

Conceived as a full private resort, the property pairs its living spaces with a fully equipped gym, a private sauna, an outdoor sala, landscaped gardens and expansive sea-view terraces. It is offered freehold with government electricity and water and modern construction standards; being off-plan, buyers can secure the residence at a key stage with scope for customization. Bophut places Fisherman's Village, international schools, beachfront dining and Samui International Airport all within easy reach.

place: Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Three-Level Panoramic Sea-View Villa with Cinema & Resort Pool, Bophut
blurb: An exclusive three-storey villa in the Bophut hills — six en-suite bedrooms plus a private studio over 1,017 m², a resort-scale 16-metre pool and sala, and a private cinema, sauna and gym, all framing uninterrupted panoramic ocean views. Offered freehold, off-plan.
detail:
Commanding an elevated position in the prestigious Bophut hills, this ultra-luxury residence spans three floors and roughly 1,017 m² of indoor living, designed for both architectural impact and exceptional comfort. Offered freehold, it pairs long-term security with elite-level lifestyle appeal and uninterrupted panoramic views over the ocean and coastline.

The home offers six spacious en-suite bedrooms plus a separate studio — ideal for guests, staff or a private workspace — with the multi-level plan separating private suites from the entertaining areas. At the heart of the outdoor space, a resort-scale 16 × 6.8-metre pool, expansive terraces and a traditional sala create multiple zones for sunset entertaining, while the elevated setting draws cooling breezes across the deck.

Lifestyle amenities run deep: a private cinema room, a sauna, a fully equipped gym, built-in designer furniture and multiple lounge spaces, all delivered fully furnished as a turnkey residence. Bophut keeps Fisherman's Village, Bophut Beach, international schools, fine dining and Samui International Airport close at hand — a statement property suited to private living, a corporate retreat or a high-yield luxury rental.

place: Chaweng Beach, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Beachfront Villa with 17-Metre Pool & Sunken Sala, Chaweng
blurb: A contemporary beachfront villa set directly on the white sand of Chaweng — five en-suite bedrooms, a 17-metre pool with a sunken sala, and a private cinema, gym, spa and kids' club, with an open-plan living core framing the Gulf. Move-in ready, freehold.
detail:
Positioned directly on the white sands of the prestigious Chaweng Palm area, this beachfront villa blends contemporary architecture with timeless island luxury across a 1,200 m² plot and 820 m² of refined living space. Five en-suite bedrooms deliver privacy and calm, while expansive open-plan living and dining areas and a seamless indoor-outdoor flow maximize ocean views — equally suited to a private residence or a high-return investment.

The outdoor space centres on a 17-metre swimming pool with a sunken pool sala, a shaded retreat that frames the sea, alongside a tropical garden, sunbeds and an outdoor BBQ and dining area. Inside, the villa is delivered with a full suite of premium facilities: a private cinema, a fully equipped gym, a dedicated spa, a kids' club, a gourmet kitchen and secure parking, all finished to a high standard.

Despite its exclusive, gated setting, the villa sits in the heart of Chaweng — steps from the island's best restaurants, shopping and nightlife, with Samui International Airport just fifteen minutes away. Offered freehold and turnkey, it is a rare move-in-ready beachfront asset in one of Thailand's most coveted destinations.

place: Five Islands Estate, Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Stone Pavilion Villa with Infinity Pool & 270° Sea Views, Taling Ngam
blurb: A sculptural stone-and-teak villa on the Taling Ngam hillside within the exclusive Five Islands Estate — hand-laid local granite walls, white-washed stone bedrooms and louvered screens, an infinity pool that empties toward the horizon, and 270-degree panoramas over the Five Islands and Ang Thong Marine Park.
detail:
Set on the serene south-west corner of Koh Samui within the private Five Islands Estate — a collection of only a couple of architect-built residences — this is a study in tactile, natural luxury. Hand-laid local granite walls, whitewashed stone, Thai teak floors and doors, terrazzo and louvered timber screens give the villa a quiet, grounded materiality that frames rather than competes with the view.

Arranged across stepped pavilions linked by stone walkways, the home opens its living, dining and kitchen volumes completely to a long sun deck and an infinity pool that reads as a sheet of water against the sea. The vantage is the headline: an uninterrupted 270-degree sweep over the Gulf, the famous Five Islands, the Ang Thong Marine Park and the green valleys and mountains behind, with some of the most spectacular sunsets found anywhere on the island.

Four serene en-suite bedrooms pair four-poster beds and warm timber floors with whitewashed stone walls and floor-to-ceiling glass framing sea or jungle; the bathrooms open to greenery and freestanding tubs. Generous indoor-outdoor entertaining spaces, a show kitchen with a terrazzo island, shaded loungers and a covered pergola lounge complete a turnkey trophy home a few minutes from the beach and the estate's neighbouring villa.

place: Five Islands Estate, Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Hillside Villa with 270° Five-Islands Views, Taling Ngam
blurb: A palatial four-bedroom villa perched on a green Taling Ngam hillside in a private estate of only a handful of homes — 270-degree panoramas over the Five Islands, Ang Thong Marine Park and the mountains, a 25-metre salt-water infinity pool, and finishes of hand-cut granite and Thai teak.
detail:
Set on the quiet south-west corner of Koh Samui within the exclusive Five Islands Estate, this is contemporary tropical living at its most assured — a palatial home spread across roughly 1,451 m² over three levels, on a generous 3,036 m² hillside plot. From its elevated position the villa commands a jaw-dropping 270-degree panorama over the sea, the famous Five Islands, the Ang Thong Marine Park, the distant mainland and the green valleys and mountains behind.

Built to the highest specification, the architecture is a study in modern Thai coastal design — hand-cut local granite walls, Thai teak floors, doors and accents, imported Sukabumi stone and distinctive terrazzo floors, with custom cast-bronze fittings throughout. The ground floor opens an indoor-outdoor great room — lounge, bar, dining for twelve and a dine-in kitchen — directly onto the pool deck and a 25-metre infinity pool run on a salt-converter system rather than chlorine.

Four en-suite bedrooms with king beds, indoor rain showers and generous wardrobes look out to sea, mountain and jungle; the lower level adds covered parking, service rooms, a dedicated spa and a secondary lounge with an 86-inch screen for cinema or yoga. One of just a few residences in the estate, it is offered fully finished — a turnkey trophy home five minutes from the beach and forty-five from the airport.

place: Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Bophut Hilltop Sea-View Villa with Horizon Pool
blurb: A modern nine-bedroom villa on Koh Samui's northernmost headland above Tongson Bay — open-plan living dissolving into an infinity pool, a circular sunken sala set in a shallow pool, a private cinema, gym and sea-view sauna, with sunrises and sunsets over the northeast coast.
detail:
Raised high on the island's northernmost point above Tongson Bay, this elegant modern villa commands a rare double aspect over Koh Samui's northeast coast — catching both the island's celebrated sunrises and its sunsets. Open-plan volumes link indoor and outdoor living across three floors, opening onto a breezy terrace, an infinity pool and a sun deck with semi-submerged sunbeds, set on a 2,180 m² hillside plot.

The villa's signature is a circular sunken seating sala set within a shallow pool at the terrace's edge — a sculptural spot for sunset drinks and ocean-gazing — alongside a circular decorative helipad deck for sunset events and photographs (ornamental, not an operational landing pad) — with outdoor dining beneath a cantilevered canopy at a sixteen-seat table and bar. Inside, sleek contemporary interiors with elegant Asian detailing frame a 90-inch lounge screen and a handcrafted dining table for ten.

Nine en-suite bedrooms — seven original suites plus two newer additions and a children's room — are complemented by exclusive amenities: a private cinema, an adults' games lounge with open bar, a fully equipped gym, a sea-view sauna, an ice bath and an in-villa massage room, all underpinned by full backup power. Move-in ready and a proven luxury rental, it sits fifteen minutes from the airport and a short walk from Thong Sai Beach.

features.l: Short walk to Thong Sai Beach

place: ORLA, Dorchester Collection, West Crescent, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai, UAE
title: ORLA — Super Penthouse with Sea Views, Dorchester Collection
blurb: An 11,367 sq ft super penthouse at the pinnacle of Palm Jumeirah — ORLA, Dorchester Collection by OMNIYAT — with sea views, a private pool and the Collection's legendary service within a sculptural three-tower landmark.
detail:
Placed at the pinnacle of Palm Jumeirah, one of the world's most celebrated addresses, ORLA is the latest visionary development by OMNIYAT — a bespoke lifestyle steeped in sumptuous style and sophistication. ORLA immerses you in balance and beauty, fostering a deep connection with your space and surroundings, its architecture conceived through the lens of natural elements with flowing water features and lush greenery that erase boundaries and let positive energy flow.

ORLA's three staggered towers link into a single dramatic form, optimising wind flow to channel cooling breezes while incorporating environmentally-sensitive technologies that respond intelligently to context. Across 11,367 sq ft, this four-bedroom super penthouse pairs grand living volumes with floor-to-ceiling glazing, a private pool and sweeping sea views over the Palm.

Residents enjoy ORLA's resident-only beach club, private cinemas, fitness and wellness suites and entertainment lounges — the Dorchester Collection standard of five-star service, delivered by OMNIYAT in one of Dubai's most coveted beachfront settings.

features.l: Sweeping sea views over the Palm

place: ALBA Residences, Dorchester Collection, East Crescent, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai, UAE
title: ALBA Residences — Sea-View Apartment, Dorchester Collection
blurb: A four-bedroom beachfront apartment at The ALBA Residences, Dorchester Collection — a Zaha Hadid Architects curved creation on Palm Jumeirah's East Crescent, with sea views, private beach access and the UAE's most extensive well-living amenities.
detail:
At The ALBA Residences, each moment is shaped by the essence of well-living. From the thoughtful design to the serene lifestyle, every detail is crafted with understated elegance — a private beachfront haven and OMNIYAT masterpiece centred on tranquillity, reconnection and renewal, where you don't just live but thrive.

Enshrined in Zaha Hadid Architects' singular curved creation are meticulously designed residences, each attended by the legendary service only Dorchester Collection can provide — the only garden-retreat hotel by the sea in the Collection's portfolio. Tropical gardens, holistic spa treatments, tailored wellness routines and exquisite culinary experiences coalesce into a calming yet luxurious lifestyle, with sea views across Palm Jumeirah from this four-bedroom home.

Residents enjoy the most extensive well-living and amenities programme in the United Arab Emirates: a branded wellness centre with treatment rooms, vitality pools, private beach access and a state-of-the-art fitness suite, all set within resort-style landscaping by Vladimir Djurovic — a flourishing arcadia where nature thrives and time unfolds at your own pace.

place: Umalas, Kerobokan, North Kuta, Bali, Indonesia
title: Designer Mediterranean Villa in Umalas
blurb: A beautifully designed four-bedroom villa in sought-after Umalas — clean lines, natural textures and floor-to-ceiling glass opening to a private pool and tropical garden, minutes from Canggu's cafés and beaches.
detail:
Positioned in one of Bali's most sought-after residential enclaves, this beautifully designed villa presents a seamless blend of modern architecture and tropical sensibility. Clean lines, natural textures and expansive openings create a home that feels both refined and relaxed — ideal for full-time living or as a high-performing investment.

Thoughtfully arranged to maximise natural light and airflow, floor-to-ceiling glass doors connect the indoor living area to the private pool and landscaped garden for a fluid indoor-outdoor experience. The open-plan living and dining space is complemented by a fully equipped modern kitchen, perfect for entertaining or quiet family evenings. Each of the four bedrooms is generously sized and designed as a private retreat with its own en-suite, soft neutral palettes and quality finishes; the master suite enjoys direct pool access for a resort-style ambiance.

Outdoors, the private swimming pool is framed by tropical greenery — a serene escape minutes from popular cafés, fitness studios and beaches, with strong rental appeal. Set on 540 m² of land with 348 m² of building, the villa is offered leasehold until 2054 (Pondok Wisata / tourism licence) — a turnkey opportunity combining comfort, design integrity and long-term value.

place: Pererenan, Mengwi, Badung, Bali, Indonesia
title: Iconic Modern-Luxe Designer Villa in Pererenan
blurb: An architectural statement in the heart of Pererenan — a six-bedroom designer estate of two buildings linked by a covered bridge, with imported Italian marble, an L-shaped pool, a private cinema and panoramic rice-paddy views, minutes from Canggu.
detail:
An architectural masterpiece that redefines luxury living in one of Bali's most sought-after destinations — Pererenan. This iconic six-bedroom designer villa blends contemporary sophistication with tropical charm, minutes from the beach, Canggu's vibrant dining scene and world-famous surf breaks. Positioned on 1,960 m² of land with a total building size of 1,575 m², every element has been curated to perfection, from the grand layout and imported materials to surroundings framed by lush rice paddies.

Inside, premium imported Italian marble slabs, aluminium-framed glass doors and bespoke finishes exude timeless elegance, with fluid transitions between indoor and outdoor spaces. The six en-suite bedrooms each capture panoramic rice-field views, and the villa's two main buildings are connected by a covered bridge — a distinctive sense of scale and privacy.

Entertainment is at the core: a dedicated cinema room, a secluded upstairs living area for sunset cocktails, and a ground-level entertainment zone with a pool table, elegant dining area and integrated modern kitchen that opens to the outdoors through wide glass sliders. Outside, a lush garden surrounds an enticing L-shaped swimming pool — a serene escape for lounging or poolside gatherings. Offered freehold.

features.l: Two buildings linked by covered bridge

place: Umalas, Kerobokan, North Kuta, Bali, Indonesia
title: Biombo Architects Tropical Villa in Umalas
blurb: An award-winning Biombo Architects villa in tranquil Umalas — three en-suite bedrooms, an integrated indoor pool, a signature aged-wood roof and a diagonal layout that draws the eye straight through to the water, under 2 km from Berawa Beach.
detail:
A modern architectural masterpiece in the tranquil, highly sought-after area of Umalas, this villa captures the essence of luxury tropical living — serene yet convenient, with easy access to Umalas's dining scene and chic cafés, and just under 2 km from Berawa Beach. Crafted by the renowned Biombo Architects, it forms part of an exclusive private compound of three architectural gems.

The villa is a true expression of modern minimalism intertwined with natural beauty. Its open-plan living area flows gracefully toward the pool, and a distinctive diagonal layout enhances openness and fluidity — the clever orientation optimising natural light and offering uninterrupted views from the entrance through to the integrated pool at the home's heart. Three elegant bedrooms each have en-suite bathrooms, with a sunken circular bathtub positioned as a statement feature.

A signature architectural roof of aged wooden tiles gracefully envelops the villa — a hallmark of Biombo's refined aesthetic — while stone finishes and organic textures reflect timeless elegance and sustainability. Refined yet understated, it suits a residence, holiday home or investment alike, in an exclusive compound of only three villas. Offered leasehold to 2051 with the possibility to extend.

place: Tumbak Bayuh, North Pererenan, Mengwi, Bali, Indonesia
title: The Eclectic Haven of Philosophy — Pererenan
blurb: A living masterpiece in Tumbak Bayuh, North Pererenan — a six-bedroom estate of art and architecture wrapped in 2,300 m² of rice paddies, with dual pools, a basket-clad grand pavilion and a private art studio, minutes from Canggu.
detail:
A living masterpiece of timeless elegance in Tumbak Bayuh, North Pererenan, this extraordinary residence rests amid serene rice-field landscapes, moments from Canggu's restaurants, cafés and the golden sands of Batu Bolong and Pererenan Beach. Set on an expansive 2,300 m² (23-are) estate, it enjoys uninterrupted rice-paddy views and spectacular sunsets in every direction.

Masterfully envisioned by a renowned architect in collaboration with a world-acclaimed artist, the villa transcends design to become an expression of art itself — where Bali's organic soul, India's cultural motifs and Africa's earthy essence intertwine. Inside, it unfolds like a private gallery of antique collections, curated artworks and layered textures. Six spacious en-suite bedrooms each offer spa-inspired bathrooms, and the master suites enjoy 360-degree panoramas across the rice fields.

At its heart, a spectacular open-plan living pavilion soars beneath a towering ceiling adorned with thousands of handwoven baskets, flowing into a state-of-the-art kitchen and dining area overlooking the gardens and dual swimming pools — a full-length lap pool and a serene plunge pool. A dedicated art studio, elegant TV lounge and a BBQ and entertainment pavilion complete a rare fusion of art, architecture and soul. Offered leasehold to 2084.

place: VELA, Dorchester Collection, Marasi Bay, Burj Khalifa District, Dubai, UAE
title: VELA — Penthouse with Pool & Burj Khalifa Views
blurb: A four-bedroom penthouse at VELA, Dorchester Collection — 4,926 sq ft of interior plus 6,217 sq ft of outdoor living, a wraparound L-shaped infinity pool over Burj Khalifa and Marasi Bay, and direct access to the marina promenade.
detail:
Rising above the sparkling waters of Marasi Bay in the Burj Khalifa District, VELA, Dorchester Collection, Dubai is a sublime celebration of contemporary waterfront living. Designed by Foster + Partners and fully furnished by Gilles & Boissier, each of VELA's 38 residences presents an unparalleled indoor-outdoor lifestyle with an array of world-class amenities.

This four-bedroom penthouse offers 4,926 sq ft of interior space and 6,217 sq ft of outdoor living, with a wraparound terrace and an L-shaped infinity pool overlooking Burj Khalifa, Marasi Bay and Downtown Dubai. A dramatic double-height living room with floor-to-ceiling windows and a sculptural staircase creates a striking focal point — ideal for entertaining and taking in the skyline.

Each bedroom has its own en-suite, with the master suite enjoying a private terrace and uninterrupted vistas. A private lift lobby and direct access to the Marasi Bay waterfront promenade and marina let you reach the open sea from your doorstep, all wrapped in Dorchester Collection's legendary five-star service.

place: VELA Viento, Marasi Bay, Burj Khalifa District, Dubai, UAE
title: VELA Viento — 2-Bedroom Residence with Study
blurb: A two-bedroom-plus-study residence at VELA Viento, Dorchester Collection — fully furnished, with wide terraces framing Marasi Bay and the Burj Khalifa skyline, by Foster + Partners and Gilles & Boissier.
detail:
VELA Viento, Dorchester Collection, Dubai ascends to celestial heights above Marasi Bay in the Burj Khalifa District. Crafted by OMNIYAT, it merges the architectural mastery of Foster + Partners, the refined interiors of Gilles & Boissier and the timeless hospitality of Dorchester Collection, rising from the canal to a soaring 180 metres. The fully furnished residences are designed for seamless indoor-outdoor living, framing panoramic views of Marasi Bay, Burj Khalifa and Downtown Dubai.

Designed for those who seek both elegance and versatility, the two-bedroom + study residence offers a rare balance of intimacy and openness. Generous living spaces flow effortlessly onto wide-set terraces framing uninterrupted views of the waterfront and skyline, while the study — set apart with intention — becomes a space for quiet thought, creativity or purposeful living.

Every element, from the proportions to the palette, has been curated to evoke calm, clarity and a deep connection to the surrounding landscape — with access to skyline pools, private lounges, fitness suites and spa sanctuaries throughout the tower.

place: VELA Viento, Marasi Bay, Burj Khalifa District, Dubai, UAE
title: VELA Viento — Four-Bedroom Duplex with Private Pools
blurb: Among the most exceptional residences at VELA Viento, Dorchester Collection — a four-bedroom duplex with six terraces, two private pools and a gravity-defying dining room suspended between earth and sky above Marasi Bay.
detail:
VELA Viento, Dorchester Collection, Dubai ascends to celestial heights above Marasi Bay in the Burj Khalifa District. Crafted by OMNIYAT, it merges the architectural mastery of Foster + Partners, the refined interiors of Gilles & Boissier and the timeless hospitality of Dorchester Collection, rising from the canal to 180 metres with fully furnished residences framing panoramic views of Marasi Bay, Burj Khalifa and Downtown Dubai.

Among the most exceptional residences, the four-bedroom duplexes are distinguished by six terraces, two private pools, and a gravity-defying dining room suspended in apparent weightlessness — creating the sensation of floating between earth and sky. Here the sky is truly the limit, and the connection to the open air and sweeping surrounds of Dubai is felt in every sense.

Every amenity, from skyline pools and private lounges to dedicated fitness suites and spa sanctuaries, has been shaped by comfort and considered luxury — a new chapter in OMNIYAT's transformation of Marasi Bay into an ultra-luxury waterfront destination.

place: ORLA, Dorchester Collection, West Crescent, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai, UAE
title: Sol Super Penthouse at ORLA, Dorchester Collection
blurb: A 30,742 sq ft super penthouse at ORLA, Dorchester Collection on Palm Jumeirah — indoor and outdoor blending seamlessly with sea and sky, within OMNIYAT's sculptural three-tower beachfront masterpiece.
detail:
The Sol Super Penthouse at ORLA is your exclusive escape, where indoor and outdoor blend seamlessly with sea and sky, as energising light streams through the residence creating eternal vistas — from the moment the sun rises above the horizon to the last golden rays shimmering off the sea below.

ORLA immerses you in balance and beauty, fostering a deep connection with your space and surroundings. The architecture is conceived through the lens of natural elements, integrating flowing water features and lush greenery to erase boundaries and let positive energy flow through the home. ORLA's three staggered towers link into a single dramatic form that optimises wind flow to channel cooling breezes, with environmentally-sensitive technologies responding intelligently in real time.

Across 30,742 sq ft, the residence pairs five bedrooms with sumptuous living volumes, floor-to-ceiling glazing and a private pool, and grants access to ORLA's resident beach club, cinemas, fitness and wellness suites — the Dorchester Collection standard of service, delivered by OMNIYAT.

place: ORLA, Dorchester Collection, West Crescent, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai, UAE
title: Nova Super Penthouse at ORLA, Dorchester Collection
blurb: A 20,107 sq ft super penthouse at ORLA, Dorchester Collection on Palm Jumeirah — sea, sky and light woven through every space within OMNIYAT's sculptural three-tower beachfront landmark.
detail:
The Nova Super Penthouse at ORLA is your exclusive escape, where indoor and outdoor blend seamlessly with sea and sky, as energising light streams through the residence creating eternal vistas — from sunrise above the horizon to the last golden rays shimmering off the sea below.

ORLA immerses you in balance and beauty, fostering a deep connection with your space and surroundings.
