place: ORLA, Dorchester Collection, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai, UAE
title: Luna Sky Palace at ORLA, Dorchester Collection
blurb: A 58,470 sq ft tri-level sky palace atop ORLA, Dorchester Collection on Palm Jumeirah — a wellness spa, double-height living, a private ten-car gallery and a 36-metre rooftop infinity pool with a sky garden.
detail:
Crafted by visionaries, for visionaries, Luna Sky Palace is a 58,470 sq ft palace on Dubai's world-renowned Palm Jumeirah. Complete with an exclusive wellness spa, sumptuous double-height living spaces and a private ten-car gallery, it extends over three levels — culminating in a breathtaking sky-garden rooftop with an entertainment zone, sunset lounge, jacuzzi and an awe-inspiring 36-metre infinity pool.

A grand arrival experience awaits on the lobby level, with direct lift access, valet parking, a private basement lounge and lobby lounge with a private office for assistants. The grand hall opens to living, dining and bar areas plus a formal living room with double-height ceilings, all framed by floor-to-ceiling windows capturing the beach, sea and Dubai skyline. The master suite is a haven of luxury with his & hers walk-in closets, while the upper level holds a family living and media room and a sophisticated home office.

As a residence of ORLA, Dorchester Collection — a beachfront masterpiece by OMNIYAT — owners enjoy a resident-only beach club, two private cinemas, cigar lounges, a fitness suite, indoor children's areas, a bowling alley and entertainment lounges. Part of the OMNIYAT Bespoke collection, Luna Sky Palace sets a new standard for life on the Palm.

place: VELA Viento, Marasi Bay, Burj Khalifa District, Dubai, UAE
title: VELA Viento — Dorchester Collection Residence
blurb: A three-bedroom residence at VELA Viento, Dorchester Collection — rising 180 m above Marasi Bay in the Burj Khalifa District, with Foster + Partners architecture, Gilles & Boissier interiors and Dorchester Collection service.
detail:
VELA Viento, Dorchester Collection, Dubai ascends to celestial heights above Marasi Bay in the Burj Khalifa District, where land and water converge into a lifestyle without compare. Crafted by OMNIYAT, it merges the architectural mastery of Foster + Partners, the refined interiors of Gilles & Boissier, and the timeless hospitality of Dorchester Collection — rising from the canal to a soaring 180 metres.

The fully furnished residences are designed for seamless indoor-outdoor living with generous proportions, framing panoramic views of Marasi Bay, Burj Khalifa and Downtown Dubai. Every amenity — from skyline pools and private lounges to dedicated fitness suites and spa sanctuaries — has been shaped by comfort and considered luxury.

This three-bedroom residence is crafted for those who value expansive living and elevated design. Flowing layouts and generous proportions give a sense of volume and grace; floor-to-ceiling windows invite natural light to move through the space, while multiple terraces provide open-air moments framed by striking views of Marasi Bay. Each bedroom is a private haven, thoughtfully positioned for comfort and seclusion, while the living areas are designed to gather, entertain and inspire.

place: The Opus by Omniyat, Business Bay, Dubai, UAE
title: The Opus Super Penthouse by Zaha Hadid
blurb: A one-of-a-kind super penthouse crowning The Opus — the last completed gem of Dame Zaha Hadid's legacy — 12,788 sq ft of OMNIYAT Atelier interiors above Downtown Dubai.
detail:
The Opus Penthouse by OMNIYAT is a one-of-a-kind creation within a one-of-a-kind masterpiece, crowning the last gem of Dame Zaha Hadid's legacy. This extraordinary four-bedroom residence spans 12,788 sq ft (approximately 1,188 m²) of ultra-luxury living space designed and delivered by OMNIYAT Atelier.

Bringing together the world's finest artists, artisans and luxury brands, the penthouse represents the pinnacle of sophisticated city living. Expansive rooms, soaring ceilings and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions define a lifestyle of elegance and refinement.

From curated furnishings to impeccable finishes, every detail reflects a commitment to exceptional craftsmanship, resulting in a residence that is both timeless and inspiring — set within one of the most architecturally significant buildings in Downtown Dubai.

place: Bo Phut Hills, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Villa Boomerang — Architectural Sea-View Villa
blurb: A bold architectural statement set into a dramatic Bo Phut hillside — a sweeping curved roofline over full-height glass, a long infinity pool, and uninterrupted panoramas across the Gulf of Thailand. Off-plan, in a prestigious gated estate.
detail:
Set within one of Koh Samui's most prestigious gated estates, Villa Boomerang is a bold architectural statement designed to merge seamlessly with its dramatic hillside surroundings. Positioned on a prime 1,610 m² plot with over 1,000 m² of built space, it brings design, nature and engineering together in perfect harmony — created for discerning buyers seeking a true statement home, with panoramic views over the Gulf of Thailand and a living experience that is both elevated and deeply connected to its environment.

Defined by its sweeping curved roofline clad in dark standing-seam metal, the villa is both sculptural and functional. Beneath it, full-height black steel-framed glass walls stretch across the entire living level, dissolving the boundary between indoor and outdoor space. The structure reads as a single continuous plane — part pavilion, part contemporary sanctuary — blending raw board-formed concrete and natural stone with refined finishes and warm timber accents.

The upper level forms the heart of the home, where open-plan living flows onto the pool terrace and endless sea views, and the master suite is positioned to capture the ocean directly from bed. Below, three further bedrooms are set into the hillside, each with its own terrace and lush tropical greenery. The pool terrace is built for relaxation and entertaining — a long infinity pool, a sunken lounge, and a fully equipped outdoor dining space under the extended roofline — while basement parking, tier-1 infrastructure and a renowned architectural team complete a future landmark, around 22 minutes from Samui International Airport.

features.l: Master suite with ocean views from bed

place: Choeng Mon, Koh Samui, Thailand
title: Panoramic Gulf-View Hilltop Villa
blurb: Perched at one of the highest points of a prestigious gated hilltop estate, a four-bedroom villa with sweeping southern and western views across the Gulf of Thailand — an infinity pool, two kitchens, a private gym and an oversized interior garden.
detail:
Perched at one of the highest vantage points within a prestigious gated hilltop estate, this villa offers a rarefied blend of elevation, privacy and sweeping views across the Gulf of Thailand — from sunrise reflections on the sea to glowing island sunsets. A hidden sanctuary carved into the hillside, it sits just minutes from Koh Samui's beaches and dining yet feels worlds away, with full privacy, gentle sea breezes and cinematic skies at dusk.

Built around an oversized central interior garden — a rare feature on the estate — the villa wraps around its natural surroundings with balance and grace. Spacious open-plan living areas flow out to shaded terraces, sun decks and a spectacular 5.4 × 14 m infinity-edge pool designed for laps, lounging or lively gatherings. Two fully equipped kitchens cater to both family life and elegant entertaining, from casual BBQs to private-chef dinners.

Each of the four oversized bedrooms is a personal retreat with natural light and an en-suite bathroom; the master adds an indulgent oversized bathtub and rain shower framed by the view, with six bathrooms in total and two maids' rooms for seamless service. Part of a gated community known for architectural distinction and five-star service, the villa is a short drive from Samui International Airport, Chaweng Beach and the island's elite beach clubs.

place: Choeng Mon, Koh Samui, Thailand
title: Summit Villa — 360° Sea Views on Koh Samui
blurb: Poised at the very summit of its estate, a five-bedroom villa with unrivalled 360-degree views — five sea-view suites, an infinity-edge pool, a private cinema and gym, and contemporary Asian art throughout.
detail:
Step into a realm of unparalleled luxury at the crown jewel of its Samui estate. Poised at the summit, the residence commands unrivalled 360-degree views, establishing it as one of the most captivating dwellings on the island. Five suite bedrooms each present breathtaking sea views, seamlessly integrating opulence with sophistication.

The villa is built for both grand occasions and intimate gatherings: a state-of-the-art cinema, a private gym and a meticulously crafted spiral staircase elevate the living experience, while the infinity-edge pool blurs the boundary between water and sky. The interior is a testament to luxury — fully equipped kitchens, contemporary Asian art and refined accents throughout enhance its elegance.

Whether envisioning a star-studded soirée on the island's pinnacle or an intimate dinner with close friends, the villa provides the ideal venue for any occasion, with terraces, sun loungers and outdoor dining set against the endless horizon.

place: Bophut Hills, Bo Phut, Koh Samui, Thailand
title: Bophut Hills Hilltop Villa — Koh Phangan Panorama
blurb: A six-bedroom hilltop villa in the scenic Bophut Hills, with a sunrise-to-sunset panorama over Samui's northern shore and Koh Phangan — a 25-metre infinity pool, Thai sala, cathedral-ceiling living, and a resident chef and villa manager.
detail:
A tropical hilltop paradise in the scenic Bophut Hills, just a 15–20 minute drive from Koh Samui International Airport. The six-bedroom villa is strategically positioned for a breathtaking sunrise-to-sunset panorama over Samui's pristine northern shore and the enchanting Koh Phangan — 'Full Moon Island' — on the horizon. Secluded and serene, it remains surprisingly close to key destinations: around 10 minutes to Fisherman's Village and 15 minutes to the vibrant lifestyle of Chaweng.

Each of the six bedrooms is designed for comfort and style with its own private sea-view terrace, and recent renovations have introduced a lighter, more contemporary ambiance throughout. The living and dining space, crowned by a soaring cathedral ceiling, serves as a spectacular social hub — overlooking the 25-metre infinity-edge pool, a traditional Thai-style sala and the mesmerising sea beyond.

The experience is elevated by a dedicated team, including an experienced multilingual villa manager and a resident chef, alongside an internal elevator, gym, sauna, jacuzzi, spa room and kids' room. From culinary delights to personalised service, it is a polished, turnkey hilltop retreat for families or groups seeking the epitome of private villa living on Koh Samui.

place: Koh Samui, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Panoramic Sea-View Estate on Koh Samui
blurb: A six-bedroom estate conceived as one of Koh Samui's finest private havens — pavilion bedrooms with unobstructed sea and island views, a 25-metre infinity pool, and a resort's worth of amenities from private cinema and tennis court to a Muay Thai ring.
detail:
Welcome to a crown jewel of luxury living on Koh Samui — a stunning six-bedroom estate that stands as one of the island's finest private havens, perched for unobstructed views of the sea. You enter across stepping stones over a serene koi pond, with tall Buddha statues set into a stone-clad wall, setting the tone for the opulence that follows. At the heart of the residence, a two-storey pavilion houses a vast glass-walled lounge and dining room on the upper level, where contemporary artwork and a cascading glass chandelier meet seascapes and lush tropical forest on every side.

The three master bedrooms each occupy standalone pavilions, positioned for dramatic sea and island views from their king-size beds, with glass-walled rain showers, private rooftop gardens, terrazzo bathtubs and terraces — and one suite enjoys its own private 12-metre pool. Doors slide open onto wide terraces above the garden and the enticing 25-metre infinity pool, which blends seamlessly into the horizon.

Far more than a retreat, the estate is an entertainment haven: a private cinema with ten recliners, a games room with pool table, a children's club and playroom, a fully equipped gym, sauna and dedicated spa room, plus a private tennis court and a Muay Thai boxing ring. With a full team of dedicated staff and private chef on hand, it is a singular setting for celebrations and gatherings — the pinnacle of luxury living on Koh Samui.

features.l: One suite with private 12 m pool
Private tennis court & Muay Thai ring

place: Surin, Choeng Thale, Thalang, Phuket, Thailand
title: Boutique Sea-View Villa at Surin
blurb: One of only five villas in a secure private estate above Surin Bay — a contemporary modern-Thai boutique villa over three levels, with an 18-metre L-shaped infinity pool, a sala, and sweeping views across Surin's white sands and azure water.
detail:
One of just five exclusively designed villas in a secure private development on Phuket's north-west coast, overlooking Surin Bay with its white sandy shores, lush landscape and azure waters — the perfect tropical retreat for rest and rejuvenation. The villa is set on a 550 m² plot with a further 500 m² of terracing, gardens and balconies, with accommodation laid out across three levels for comfortable, exclusive living.

Decoration and design are contemporary modern Thai: living spaces blend solid wood and terrazzo flooring, while black fired-slate is used extensively through the bathrooms. The main living and dining room shares the magnificent view of Surin bay and beach, with several terraces and balconies leading off it for al-fresco dining and sundowners. All four bedrooms are air-conditioned and come with en-suite bathrooms.

The terraced outdoor areas feature a pond and an 18-metre L-shaped infinity pool, with a sala for relaxing or enjoying an outdoor massage. Tucked between Kamala and Bang Tao, Surin offers a calm, upscale beach lifestyle — soft sand and clear water moments away, with boutique dining, beach clubs, international schools and Bang Tao's Boat Avenue and Porto de Phuket all within easy reach.

features.l: One of only 5 villas in the estate

place: SCOPE Thonglor, Sukhumvit, Thonglor, Bangkok, Thailand
title: Scope Thonglor — Triplex Penthouse by Thomas Juul-Hansen
blurb: A triplex penthouse at Scope Thonglor — one of only eighteen residences in the building — designed by Thomas Juul-Hansen across three private levels, with two private lifts, panoramic city views and a dedicated Penthouse Assistant service.
detail:
One of the most private and architecturally refined penthouses in Thonglor. Designed by world-renowned architect Thomas Juul-Hansen, this triplex residence embodies understated international luxury, natural materials and timeless spatial proportions. Scope Thonglor is an ultra-limited collection of just eighteen penthouses — a one-residence-per-floor concept offering elevated privacy, dedicated service and a lifestyle tailored to those who value craftsmanship and discretion over excess.

Spanning approximately 765 m² across three private levels, the home holds five bedrooms and six bathrooms, a maid's room with dedicated service areas, and two private elevators arriving directly into the residence. Light-filled living and dining spaces flow seamlessly indoor to out, framed by floor-to-ceiling glazing and panoramic city views, with generous ceiling heights that heighten the sense of openness. The interior palette is composed of refined natural stone, warm woods and custom finishes chosen to complement Bangkok's natural light through the day.

Residents enjoy dedicated Penthouse Assistant support — housekeeping three times weekly, valet and porter assistance, in-house kitchen and meal support, private wellness conveniences, and 24-hour security and concierge. Shared amenities include a private residents' lounge, fitness studio, indoor pool, sauna and landscaped relaxation spaces, all rendered in the same architectural language as the residences. In the heart of Thonglor, the home sits moments from Thong Lo BTS and the city's finest dining, wellness and retail.

features.l: Two private elevators to the unit
Thonglor · steps to BTS Thong Lo

place: The Residences at Mandarin Oriental, Charoen Nakhon, Khlong San, Bangkok, Thailand
title: Mandarin Oriental Residences — Riverside Penthouse
blurb: A 51st-floor penthouse at the iconic Residences at Mandarin Oriental, on the Chao Phraya riverside beside Iconsiam — 606 m² with three private lifts, six en-suite bedrooms and the legendary service of the Residences Elite programme.
detail:
Legendary riverside living at the iconic Residences at Mandarin Oriental, Bangkok. Set on the Chao Phraya waterfront and directly adjacent to the celebrated Iconsiam, residents enjoy the relaxed rhythm of riverside life with the city's finest shopping, dining and culture at the doorstep. This extraordinary penthouse occupies the 51st floor and offers approximately 606 m² of internal space.

The layout is conceived for grand entertaining and gracious daily living alike: a generous living room, a separate formal dining room and a drawing room for receiving guests, opening to wide river and city panoramas through full-height glazing. Six large en-suite bedrooms provide private retreat, while dedicated maid's quarters with their own entrance and a private lift lobby — three private lifts in total — preserve a seamless sense of service and privacy.

The freehold residence is finished to the highest specification of any luxury home in Bangkok, with kitchen and bathroom fixtures from deluxe European brands. Ownership includes immediate access to Mandarin Oriental's Residences Elite programme — daily concierge and bespoke benefits at home, and exceptional recognition and privileges at Mandarin Oriental hotels around the world.

place: Porsche Design Tower, Sukhumvit 38, Thonglor, Bangkok, Thailand
title: Porsche Design Tower — Duplex Sky Villa with Private Pool
blurb: A 525 m² duplex — one of only 22 'Sky Villas' at the Porsche Design Tower Bangkok, Asia's first Porsche-branded residence — with its own heated private pool, a private car gallery reached by a spiral ramp, and panoramic Thonglor skyline views.
detail:
An incredible duplex 'Sky Villa' at the Porsche Design Tower Bangkok — a villa in the sky spanning approximately 525 m² across two levels, one of only twenty-two such residences in the building. A collaboration between Porsche Design and Ananda Development, the tower is Asia's first Porsche-branded residence and one of only three worldwide, rising on Sukhumvit 38 in the heart of Thonglor.

The architecture takes its cues directly from Porsche: an iconic 'X-Frame' structure inspired by the Mission R concept car, private car galleries connected by 'The Loop' spiral car ramp, and automated terrace doors inspired by the 911 Targa that dissolve the line between inside and out. Floor-to-ceiling glazing frames sweeping cityscapes, while the duplex's own heated private pool, gourmet Thai, Western and semi-outdoor BBQ kitchens, and smart air-quality and climate systems define life within.

Residents share an exceptional amenity deck — a 25-metre infinity pool, high-performance gym, dedicated spa, business lounge and private social spaces — with world-class concierge service throughout. Set in vibrant Thonglor, the residence sits among Michelin-starred dining, designer boutiques and nightlife, moments from BTS Thonglor. Completion is expected in 2028.

features.l: 25 m communal infinity pool, gym & spa

place: One89 Wireless, Wireless Road, Lumphini, Pathum Wan, Bangkok, Thailand
title: One89 Wireless — Seven-Bedroom Sky Residence
blurb: A rare seven-bedroom sky residence at One89 Wireless — designed by SOM and set within the same tower as the Ritz-Carlton at the One Bangkok mega-development, moments from Lumpini Park with sweeping views over the city and its green heart.
detail:
A genuinely rare seven-bedroom residence at One89 Wireless, designed by architects Skidmore, Owings & Merrill (SOM) as a landmark of healthy, sustainable living in the heart of Bangkok. The tower houses just 90 bespoke residences and forms part of the prestigious One Bangkok mega-development — this home sits within the same building as the renowned Ritz-Carlton hotel, with access to its signature services and amenities.

Spanning approximately 517 m² on a single level, the residence is laid out for grand entertaining and serene private living in equal measure: an open-plan living and dining volume with high ceilings and full-height glazing, an open kitchen with island and stone countertops, a wine cellar, and seven bedrooms each with its own bathroom and walk-in wardrobe. Floor-to-ceiling glass frames uninterrupted panoramas across the city skyline and the green expanse of nearby Lumpini Park.

Strategically positioned on Wireless Road, the residence offers easy access to the expressway, Sathorn Road and the city's luxury shopping, dining and business districts — serene green space on one side, the energy of central Bangkok on the other. Premium amenities, concierge and top-tier hotel services complete one of the most exclusive addresses in the city.

place: Noble Emmerse, Sukhumvit Road, Khlong Tan, Khlong Toei, Bangkok 10110
title: Noble Emmerse Phrom Phong
blurb: An artful 55-storey landmark rising over Phrom Phong — Noble Emmerse pairs a calm, gallery-like interior language with the full energy of the EM District, moments from the Emporium, EmQuartier and BTS Phrom Phong. One-bedroom homes through penthouses, off-plan.
detail:
Noble Emmerse Phrom Phong offers a rare balance of artistic living and urban convenience. A 55-storey high-rise of 358 residences, the tower is composed for a life of calm refinement amidst the vibrant energy of Sukhumvit — interiors of travertine, warm timber and sculptural light that feel more gallery than lobby.

Its position is the quiet luxury here. The residence sits within easy reach of the EM District — Emporium and EmQuartier — and the green of Benchasiri Park, moments from BTS Phrom Phong, and surrounded by international schools, world-class hospitals and five-star hotels.

Life unfolds across distinct amenity levels. The ground floor holds the Exotique Lobby, a Greenery Retreat and a Grab & Go station; the fourth floor gathers the Aqua Serene Pool, Emmerse Cocoon Spa, gym, Pilates studio and a cinema lounge; and high on the fifty-first floor, the Mystique Social Club, Sky Lounge, private dining and the Urban Sky Lawn open to the city skyline.

Residences range from efficient one-bedrooms of around 30 m² to expansive penthouses of up to 521 m². An automated parking building of nineteen levels provides approximately 90% parking capacity. Off-plan, with completion expected in Q3 2030 — priced from ฿8,260,000.

place: Vista del Mar, Nai Thon, Phuket, Thailand
title: Vista del Mar — Hillside Sunset-View Villa
blurb: A contemporary hillside villa at Vista del Mar, perched ~52 m above Nai Thon with uninterrupted sunset panoramas over the Andaman Sea — an infinity-edge pool, full-height glass and a calm, forest-framed setting within a gated estate.
detail:
A contemporary hillside villa at Vista del Mar, conceived as a serene private retreat overlooking the emerald canopy of Nai Thon and the vast Andaman Sea. Positioned on the western slope above one of Phuket's most untouched beaches, the residence opens to uninterrupted sunset views and a soothing natural landscape shaped by the surrounding national park. From its elevated vantage point — roughly 52 metres above sea level — sea, sky and forest meet in a single panoramic frame.

Clean geometric lines, expansive glass façades and an effortless indoor–outdoor flow define the architecture. Across approximately 630 m² over two levels, the open-plan living and dining area is finished in soft neutral palettes and warm natural textures, with full-height sliding doors that let the sea view set the mood of the home. The main living pavilion opens directly onto a spacious terrace and an infinity-edge pool — a tranquil space for open-air dining, quiet mornings and sunset gatherings.

The villa offers five serene bedroom suites, each an intimate haven with walk-in wardrobes, generous bathrooms and wide windows framing either the gardens or the sea; the master suite enjoys direct terrace access and its own sunset panorama. Delivered fully finished with fitted kitchen, bathrooms and built-in elements, the home sits within Vista del Mar — a private, low-density estate of 17,000 m² with 24-hour security, on-site management and concierge services, just 600 metres above the pristine one-kilometre bay of Nai Thon Beach.

place: Bophut Hills, Bo Phut, Koh Samui, Thailand
title: White House — Bophut Hills Sea-View Villa
blurb: A fully renovated hillside villa in the sought-after Bophut Hills community — five en-suite bedrooms plus a flexible bonus room, an infinity pool over the tropical hills and sea, a huge garden, and a self-contained studio with its own entrance.
detail:
A fully renovated sea-view villa set in the sought-after Bophut Hills community on Koh Samui's north-east coast. Past a covered two-car parking bay, the entrance walkway opens onto a terrace between the main living wing and one of the bedrooms, where an open-plan living and dining room with a new Western kitchen flows straight out to the poolside terrace — alfresco dining and easy days by the infinity pool, overlooking lush tropical hills and the ocean beyond. A discreet chef's prep kitchen sits off the main kitchen.

The home offers five bedrooms with en-suite bathrooms, plus a flexible bonus room that can serve as a family room, home office or gym, opening onto the lawn through floor-to-ceiling glass. Two master suites sit on the main living level, with further suites on the garden floor reached by stairs descending beside the pool. Outside, a huge tropical garden wraps the villa with generous lawn, sunbeds and outdoor dining.

For maximum flexibility, a separate entrance leads to a self-contained one-bedroom studio with its own living space and kitchenette — ideal as a guest, staff or rental apartment. Offered freehold or leasehold and sold fully furnished, the villa is a short drive from Fisherman's Village, international schools and Samui International Airport.

features.l: Infinity pool over the sea & hills
Flex room — family room / office / gym

place: Porsche Design Tower, Sukhumvit, Khlong Toei, Bangkok, Thailand
title: Porsche Design Tower — Quadruplex Sky Mansion
blurb: One of only two quadruplex sky mansions crowning the Porsche Design Tower — four private levels in the sky above central Bangkok, with a heated sky pool, private car lift and 360-degree skyline views.
detail:
A genuinely once-in-a-lifetime residence: one of just two quadruplex sky mansions at the top of the Porsche Design Tower, the brand's first tower in Asia. Spanning four private levels and approximately 1,135 m², the home is conceived as a vertical mansion in the sky — engineered, detailed and finished to the exacting design language Porsche is known for, high above the dense heart of central Bangkok.

Every principal space is wrapped in floor-to-ceiling glass, opening onto uninterrupted 360-degree views across the city skyline and river beyond. Interconnected by a private internal lift and sculptural stair, the levels hold a sequence of grand entertaining and living volumes, six en-suite bedrooms, multiple kitchens for daily and formal use, and dedicated lounge, study and media spaces — all arranged for absolute privacy and flooded with natural light.

The crowning feature is a private heated sky pool set against the skyline, paired with expansive sun terraces for entertaining at altitude. Residents enjoy the tower's signature amenity: a patented automated car lift that delivers vehicles directly to the residence, alongside concierge, wellness and security services befitting one of the most exclusive addresses in the region.

features.l: One of only two quadruplex units
Four private levels in the sky

place: Villa Mayavee, Waterfall Bay, Kamala, Phuket, Thailand
title: Villa Mayavee — Oceanfront Super Villa
blurb: The apogee of modern Phuket oceanfront villa design — bold linear lines and vast glass expanses over the Andaman Sea, set on a Kamala cliff top above glorious westward sunsets. Known to many who've visited as 'The James Bond Villa'.
detail:
Villa Mayavee is the apogee of modern Phuket oceanfront villa design. Big, bold, linear lines and large glass expanses overlooking the Andaman Sea set the scene of a design that seems to befit a James Bond movie set — indeed, among many who have visited, it is known as 'The James Bond Villa'. Situated on a cliff top, the villa faces westwards across the open ocean to glorious sunsets, securely and privately positioned at the end of a magnificent tree-lined boulevard of mature tropical trees within a spacious private residential estate of only eight other premium homes. From this position one can gain 360-degree views, especially from the iconic sunset roof terrace, which must rank as one of Phuket's finest viewpoints.

Set in 3,100 m² of land, the villa has a gross floor area of 2,400 m², arranged in three distinct structural areas aligned in an 'S' shape when viewed from above. The central and most obvious part is the massive 'floating' main living, dining and show-kitchen area, running parallel to the oceanfront and overlooking the especially wide 21 × 5 m main infinity pool and sunbathing areas. This is linked to the dramatic owner's suite — with its own 15 m private lap pool, spacious dressing area, linked office suite, formal dining area, commercial-grade kitchen, staff areas and internal garage — while a separate guest block houses three spacious guest bedrooms and a well-equipped gym with sauna.

Custom designed by Martin Palleros of Terra Designs, all materials were carefully chosen to exude quality and textural richness — from natural exterior stonework and Japanese pool tiles to solid wood and French limestone and sandstone floors, oversized glazing and a who's who of European furniture: Poliform, Gandia Blasco, Boffi, Dornbracht, Paola Lenti and Minotti. Multiple covered and open-air terraces provide al fresco dining and relaxation throughout, in addition to the internal air-conditioned formal, informal and TV lounges. The villa was comprehensively redecorated in 2023 and sits within gated Waterfall Bay with 24-hour on-site security and fully managed common areas.

place: Cape Yamu, Pa Klok, Thalang, Phuket, Thailand
title: Seafront Villa on Phuket's East Coast
blurb: A rare beachfront villa bringing together space, privacy and true tropical luxury — six bedrooms on a peaceful east-coast peninsula, set over 6,500 m² with private beach frontage and sweeping views across the Andaman Sea and Phang Nga Bay.
detail:
Discover a rare beachfront villa that brings together space, privacy and true tropical luxury. This impressive six-bedroom residence sits on a peaceful peninsula on Phuket's east coast within an exclusive gated community, with 6,500 m² of land and private beach frontage giving room to breathe, relax and enjoy life at your own pace. The property rises gently over the bay for sweeping views of the Andaman Sea and Phang Nga Bay, and wide windows and open layouts let every room capture sea breezes and natural light. Modern design is softened by warm Thai detailing — clean white walls, flowing drapes and traditional rooflines that keep the architecture contemporary yet rooted in its setting.

The main living area sits on the ground floor, opening directly to ocean views with indoor and outdoor dining, a modern kitchen and a large terrace. The entertainment floor below adds a cinema room, a fully stocked bar and the impressive 26 × 8 metre infinity pool, with the master bedroom on this level for easy access to the pool, lounge deck and sea views. A further lower level hosts two more bedrooms, while the lowest level is dedicated entirely to wellness — a private gym and spa room surrounded by greenery. Each bedroom offers sea or garden views and easy access to open-air spaces, with a calm palette of wood, soft fabrics and minimal décor throughout.

The villa delivers the tropical lifestyle in a prime yet private location: roughly 25 minutes to Phuket International Airport, 20 minutes to Phuket Town and to Layan, Bang Tao and Surin beaches, 15 minutes to Ao Por Grand Marina, and easy access to Laguna, Blue Canyon and Mission Hills golf courses — all with full security and a five-star community environment.

place: Cape Yamu, Tambon Pa Klok, Thalang, Phuket, Thailand
title: Elevated Waterfront Villa on Cape Yamu
blurb: An outstanding six-bedroom waterfront villa on the sought-after Yamu Peninsula — refined tropical living across two levels, a 28-metre infinity pool reaching toward the bay, and a full resort-style wellness wing, delivered fully furnished and move-in ready.
detail:
Step into a world of refined tropical living with this outstanding six-bedroom, seven-bathroom villa on the sought-after Yamu Peninsula, blending modern design, warm natural light and calming coastal scenery. It sits on a generous 2,500 m² plot with a substantial 3,994 m² build-up area arranged across two well-planned stories, offering more than enough space to relax, entertain and enjoy the peaceful surroundings, with stunning sea views from several rooms and large windows that welcome fresh breezes and bright daylight.

The property's highlight is an impressive 28-metre infinity pool, its length and orientation creating a smooth visual connection between the water and the bay beyond. The pool deck offers generous space for sunbeds and quiet afternoons by the sea, while an adjacent outdoor BBQ station and landscaped gardens make hosting and sunset dinners effortless. Indoors, a full wellness experience — private gym, spa, sauna and steam room — brings a resort-style lifestyle into everyday life, and the home comes fully furnished with tasteful décor and high-quality materials throughout.

Additional features include a maid's quarter, three-car parking and a private well for both convenience and self-sufficiency. Set within a well-gated community with round-the-clock security, the villa offers complete peace of mind while remaining minutes from Yamu's marinas, international schools, golf courses, shopping and beaches — a rare balance of privacy and easy access to Phuket's top attractions.

place: Banyan Tree Beach Residences Oceanus, Bang Tao, Choeng Thale, Phuket, Thailand
title: Banyan Tree Oceanus — Beachfront Full-Floor Residence
blurb: An absolute-beachfront, full-floor residence within Banyan Tree Beach Residences Oceanus — just sixteen homes on one of the last first-line plots on Bang Tao Beach, one expansive home per level, wrapped in uninterrupted Andaman Sea views.
detail:
Banyan Tree Beach Residences Oceanus is an exclusive beachfront collection of just sixteen ultra-luxury homes positioned on one of the last remaining first-line plots along Bang Tao Beach. Its iconic curved façade, inspired by the lines of a private ocean liner, frames uninterrupted Andaman Sea views, and the rare privilege of one expansive residence per level ensures complete privacy. This full-floor home spans approximately 415.94 m² of total area — 317.44 m² of interiors and 82 m² of outdoor terraces — delivering the spatial experience of a standalone villa with the convenience and prestige of a branded beachfront residence.

The signature oceanfront living and dining pavilion spans more than 13 metres, framed by full-height glazing that opens completely to the terrace so the horizon line and ocean breeze become part of the architecture. Natural stone, warm wood, European appliances and bespoke cabinetry reflect Banyan Tree's contemporary philosophy. Four bedroom suites are arranged for privacy: two principal suites face the ocean, each with a private balcony and spa-inspired ensuite, while two guest suites sit in their own wing, and a dedicated study offers space for work or quiet retreat. Functional spaces — open kitchen, prep area, laundry, storage, powder room and car plus buggy parking — are integrated discreetly, with direct lift access to a private foyer reinforcing the full-floor sense of arrival.

Ownership carries an elevated suite of benefits across Banyan Tree and Laguna Phuket: Sanctuary Club privileges for stays, dining and wellness, complimentary membership at Laguna Phuket Golf Club, and a 10-year Banyan Tree Private Collection membership. Set within Asia's leading integrated resort destination, the residence offers direct access to fine dining, spas, beach clubs, marinas, medical facilities and international schools — while remaining part of an intimate, low-density beachfront enclave on Phuket's west coast.

place: Layan, Tambon Choeng Thale, Thalang, Phuket, Thailand
title: Hillside Wellness Villa in Layan
blurb: Set high on the Layan hillside, an expansive contemporary villa conceived as a self-contained wellness retreat — minimalist architecture, a long lap pool, and resort-level spa, sauna and cinema spaces wrapped in landscaped valley views.
detail:
Set on an expansive hillside plot in the Layan area, this private luxury villa offers a rare combination of scale, architectural clarity and resort-level wellness amenities. Conceived as a self-contained retreat, the residence blends minimalist contemporary lines with warm natural textures, creating a calm, elevated atmosphere throughout. Arranged across several interconnected volumes on roughly 1,700 m² of land — with a built-up area approaching 1,700 m² — high ceilings, wide glazed façades and soft natural light let the indoor and outdoor zones merge into one continuous environment.

The primary living pavilion centres on a large open-plan lounge and dining area with an effortless connection to the pool terrace, supported by two kitchens: a beautifully appointed show kitchen for daily use and social gatherings, and a fully equipped back kitchen positioned discreetly for service. Five ensuite bedrooms are positioned across the villa for privacy and refined proportion; the master suite occupies its own wing with direct pool access, a spacious bathroom and ample wardrobe space, while a dedicated maid's room with separate circulation maintains the home's sense of order.

Lifestyle and wellness spaces define the villa's character — a dedicated spa room and sauna, a fitness room, a home theatre and a quiet study extend it far beyond a standard residence. Outdoors, a long swimming pool follows the line of the main pavilion alongside shaded seating and wide terraces, with mature planting and architectural screens keeping the home secluded. Tucked into a low-density stretch of the Layan hillside, it remains a short drive from Layan Beach, Banana Beach, Laguna Phuket and Bang Tao's dining and lifestyle destinations.

place: Angsana Oceanview Residences, Choeng Thale, Phuket, Thailand
title: Angsana Oceanview Residences — Laguna Penthouse
blurb: A refined beachfront residence within the iconic Laguna Phuket community — a sea-facing penthouse with its own infinity pool, steps from the soft sands of Bang Tao Beach and wrapped in resort-class service.
detail:
Angsana Oceanview Residences is a refined beachfront condominium offering 149 exclusive apartments across seven elegant floors. Developed by Laguna Property — creator of Laguna Seaside and Laguna Lakeside — this residence brings a new level of resort-style sophistication to the iconic Laguna Phuket community. The architecture blends contemporary elegance with distinctive Thai design, and every residence is designed as a secluded sanctuary: private, tranquil, and seamlessly connected to nature.

This sea-facing penthouse spans 304 m² with two bedrooms and two bathrooms, a private infinity pool, and a terrace framing uninterrupted ocean views. Floor-to-ceiling glass, an open kitchen and generous outdoor living space make it equally suited to unforgettable holidays or refined long-term living, just steps from Bang Tao Beach.

Set within Laguna Phuket — awarded "Asia's Best Integrated Resort" — ownership opens onto world-class golf, spas, fine dining and beach clubs. A professionally managed rental program by Angsana Laguna Phuket offers strong income potential alongside a complimentary 60-day owner stay each year, while exclusive Sanctuary Club privileges extend special rates across Banyan Tree resorts, spas and boutiques worldwide.

place: Lamai Beach, Koh Samui, Thailand
title: Contemporary 3-Bedroom Beachfront Villa
blurb: A rare beachfront gem on one of Koh Samui's most secluded white-sand beaches — 28 metres of private frontage, uninterrupted sea views, and direct estate access to an 800-metre stretch of pristine shoreline, all within a 24-hour gated community.
detail:
A rare gem on one of Koh Samui's most beautiful and secluded white-sand beaches, this beachfront villa offers 28 metres of private frontage and uninterrupted sea views throughout the year. Set within an exclusive 24-hour gated residential estate with private access to an 800-metre stretch of pristine shoreline, the home combines unmatched privacy with exceptional convenience — just moments from Lamai town, yet hidden from tourist traffic. Only 200 metres down the beach, a stylish beach club offers dining, drinks and a peaceful social atmosphere, while a short stroll inland brings you to a premium sports and wellness club featuring a tennis court, gym, spa, restaurant and kids' club — with the rare benefit of room service delivered directly to your villa.

White sand and lush tropical gardens surround this serene escape, designed for rest, rejuvenation and effortless island living. In a contemporary coastal style, the villa features glass doors and windows throughout, allowing the interior to merge beautifully with the surrounding greenery and ocean views. The open-plan living, dining and kitchen area is bright and spacious, decorated in crisp whites and soft blues for a clean, modern beach aesthetic, and the fully-equipped Western kitchen provides everything needed for cooking at home — or you can enjoy meal delivery and private chef services available within the estate.

All three bedrooms come with en-suite bathrooms: two feature king beds and direct terrace access, while the third includes twin beds — ideal for family or guests. The master offers garden and sea views, with sliding glass doors leading directly to the terrace. Outside, a generous sun terrace wraps around the villa with multiple zones for lounging and dining, and a traditional Thai-style beachside sala provides the perfect spot to enjoy the morning sunrise or unwind with an evening drink while listening to the waves.

features.l: Direct access to 800 m white-sand beach
Beach club 200 m along the sand

place: Thong Krut, Taling Ngam, Koh Samui, Thailand
title: Private Hillside Sea & Mountain View Estate
blurb: Set within an exclusive gated estate in the tranquil south of Koh Samui, a five-bedroom hillside villa wrapped in lush hills and uninterrupted views of the southern islands — refined, private, and surrounded by nothing but green and sea.
detail:
Set within an exclusive gated estate in the tranquil south of Koh Samui, this exceptional five-bedroom villa offers a rare blend of privacy, scale and breathtaking natural beauty. Surrounded by lush hills and overlooking the southern islands, the property captures uninterrupted sea and mountain views from every angle. Positioned on a generous 1,693 m² plot with 830 m² of built space, it is designed for those seeking refined living in a peaceful, nature-immersed environment — far from the crowds, yet within a well-managed and secure community.

Designed to embrace its natural surroundings, every room opens directly onto outdoor terraces, creating a seamless flow between interior living and the landscape beyond. The 48 m² saltwater infinity pool and large sun deck become the focal point of the home, with uninterrupted views across the ocean and nearby islands, while a traditional Thai sala nestled in the garden offers a quiet retreat for relaxation, meditation or sunset moments. An independent ground-floor apartment adds flexibility — ideal as a guest suite, staff quarters, or private living space.

Located in the serene Thong Krut / Taling Ngam area, known for its untouched beauty and relaxed atmosphere, the estate sits close to Thong Krut Beach and local seaside restaurants, near luxury resorts and quiet coastal stretches, and roughly 30–40 minutes from Samui International Airport via a wide, double-lane road. The setting is highly valued for its privacy, natural surroundings and spectacular sunsets over the southern islands — all within a private gated community with 24/7 security, well-maintained infrastructure, and rare easy hillside access.

place: Nathon, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84140, Thailand
title: Flat Beachfront Plot with 59m Sea Frontage, Nathon
blurb: A rare flat, Chanote-titled beachfront plot on Koh Samui's quieter west coast, between Nathon and Lipa Noi — 59 metres of direct sea frontage and 2,859.6 m² of level ground, ready for a private estate or a low-density boutique villa compound.
detail:
This is a rare opportunity to acquire a flat coastal plot on Koh Samui's increasingly sought-after west coast. Ideally positioned between Nathon and Lipa Noi, the land enjoys an impressive 59 metres of direct beachfront frontage — well suited to a private luxury residence or a low-density boutique development. Offered at ฿55,000,000, this Chanote-titled plot pairs strong development fundamentals with long-term investment appeal.

With a total land size of approximately 1-4-14.9 Rai (2,859.6 m²), the flat topography significantly reduces construction complexity and cost compared with the island's hillside sites, while the wide frontage allows unobstructed sea views, direct beach access and flexible architectural design. Local guidelines permit single-storey structures beyond a 10-metre coastal setback, individual footprints up to 75 m², and total coverage to 25% of the plot — ideal for an intimate villa compound or boutique resort that emphasises privacy, greenery and beachfront living.

The setting is quiet and established, in a neighbourhood of a limited number of high-end beachfront villas, minutes from Nathon town and the main ferry pier connecting Samui to the mainland. Cafés, restaurants, a Lotus's supermarket and a fresh market sit nearby, and the island's ring road is moments away. With beachfront supply on the west coast extremely limited, the plot stands out as a rare asset — for a lifestyle buyer, a developer, or long-term land banking.

place: Kata, Phuket, Thailand
title: Hillside Sea-View Villa Above Kata
blurb: Set high on the hillside above Kata Beach, a sculptural contemporary villa with one of the largest built-up footprints on Phuket's west coast — seven sea-facing suites, walls of glass, and a signature infinity pool reaching toward the Andaman horizon.
detail:
Part of a boutique, low-density estate of just eight homes, this villa is designed across multiple levels to chase the sea view and the light. 753 m² of internal space opens through floor-to-ceiling glazing onto a commanding Andaman panorama, while sliding panels fold the entire façade away so the main living level — a grand open-plan lounge, dining area and contemporary kitchen — flows straight out to the infinity pool.

Seven bedrooms and ten bathrooms include a panoramic master suite with a spa-style bath and extensive wardrobes; every additional suite is sea-facing and ensuite. A private spa room, a fully equipped fitness room and two staff rooms sit discreetly across the lower levels, alongside an estate clubhouse with elevated sea-view decks inspired by the work of Kerry Hill Architects.

Professional property management and a private concierge are built into ownership — covering maintenance, housekeeping and rental operations — with Kata's beaches, beach clubs and dining a short descent from the hillside.

place: Cape Panwa, Phuket, Thailand
mapQuery: Sri Panwa, Cape Panwa, Phuket, Thailand
title: Five-Bedroom Sky Villa at Sri Panwa
blurb: The last of just four residences in The Sky Series, set on a forested headland at the southern tip of Phuket within the grounds of the award-winning Sri Panwa resort. Four levels linked by a private lift, a double-height living room walled in glass, and a rooftop sky deck with a second lap pool above the Andaman Sea.
detail:
Positioned on a forested headland at the southern tip of Phuket — one of the island's most coveted addresses — this is the last remaining villa in The Sky Series, a collection of just four residences set within the grounds of Sri Panwa, an award-winning resort known to readers of Condé Nast Traveler as home to one of the world's best rooftop bars.

Designed by Habita Architects with interiors by Studio Chemistri, the villa rises across four levels connected by a private lift. The centrepiece is a grand double-volume living area framed by full-height glazing, where the view across the islands of Phang Nga Bay fills the room from floor to ceiling. A curved infinity pool wraps the main terrace; above it, a 118 m² rooftop sky deck with a second lap pool opens to an unobstructed 180-degree panorama — sunrise over the bay in the morning, the islands silhouetted at dusk.

The lower level houses a private spa, sauna and game room. Five bedrooms, each with its own bath and walk-in wardrobe, are finished in natural stone, hand-textured wall panels and solid wood — materials chosen to age well in a tropical climate. A separate Thai kitchen sits alongside the main chef's kitchen, and owners enjoy full access to Sri Panwa's six restaurants, wellness facilities, pool club and private beach. Delivered fully furnished; one of four villas, three already sold.

place: Surin, Choeng Thale, Phuket, Thailand
mapQuery: Surin Beach, Choeng Thale, Phuket, Thailand
title: Five-Bedroom Sea-View Villa in Surin
blurb: A tropical sea-view villa in a secure gated community on Phuket's north-west coast, walking distance to Bang Tao and Surin beaches. Five bedrooms, a private pool, and a rooftop sala for sunset entertaining — five minutes from Boat Avenue's restaurants and lifestyle amenities.
detail:
Set within a secure gated community in Choeng Thale — one of Phuket's most sought-after addresses — this tropical villa is a short walk from the soft sand of Bang Tao and Surin beaches. Recently renovated and delivered fully furnished, it balances relaxed island living with everyday convenience.

Five bedrooms and six bathrooms are arranged across generous, light-filled interiors that open to a private swimming pool and covered terrace. A rooftop sala and outdoor BBQ kitchen create an ideal setting for entertaining or watching Phuket's west-coast sunsets, while sea and scenic views frame the surrounding greenery.

The villa sits just five minutes from Boat Avenue and Porto de Phuket, with their weekend markets, restaurants, cafés and Villa Market close at hand. Air-conditioned throughout, with a private garage and gated security, it suits equally as a full-time residence or a rental-ready investment in the heart of the Bang Tao–Laguna lifestyle district.

place: Plai Laem, Koh Samui, Thailand
title: Three-Bedroom Pool Villa in Plai Laem
blurb: Malibu Villas — an exclusive collection of thirteen contemporary tropical pool villas in Plai Laem, a two-minute walk from the beach. A single proven 3-bedroom, 4-bath layout with a private pool, wrapped in landscaped garden and finished for easy island living.
detail:
Malibu Villas is an intimate collection of thirteen contemporary tropical pool villas set in Plai Laem on Koh Samui's north-east coast — around 150 metres, a two-minute walk, from the beach, in a quiet, leafy neighbourhood with quick access to Chaweng, Bophut and the airport.

Every villa follows one refined, proven layout: three bedrooms and four bathrooms across 153 m² of built-up living space, opening to generous outdoor living. An 8.0 × 3.6 m private pool sits beside a 21.5 m² pavilion, wrapped by landscaped garden and served by a private carport, on plots ranging from 320 to 428 m².

Held on a 30-year leasehold with staged, construction-linked payments, the villas suit both owner-occupiers and investors building a rental-ready asset in one of Samui's most walkable beach neighbourhoods. An optional full furniture package readies the home for guests from day one.
